items.title: NetHint: White-Box Networking for Multi-Tenant Data Centers.
items.abstract: A cloud provider today provides its network resources to its tenants as a black box, such that cloud tenants have little knowledge of the underlying network characteristics. Meanwhile, data-intensive applications have increasingly migrated to the cloud, and these applications have both the ability and the incentive to adapt their data transfer schedules based on the cloud network characteristics. We find that the black-box networking abstraction and the adaptiveness of data-intensive applications together create a mismatch, leading to sub-optimal application performance. This paper explores a white-box approach to resolving this mismatch. We propose NetHint, an interactive mechanism between a cloud tenant and a cloud provider to jointly enhance application performance. With NetHint, the provider provides a hint — an indirect indication of the underlying network characteristics (e.g., link-layer network topologies for a tenant's virtual machines, number of co-locating tenants, network bandwidth utilization), and the tenant's applications then adapt their transfer schedules accordingly. The NetHint design provides abundant network information for cloud tenants to compute their optimal transfer schedules, while introducing little overhead for the cloud provider to collect and expose this information. Evaluation results show that NetHint improves the average performance of allreduce completion time, broadcast completion time, and MapReduce shuffle completion time by 2.7×, 1.5×, and 1.2×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，云提供商将其网络资源作为黑匣子提供给租户，使得云租户对底层网络特征知之甚少。与此同时，数据密集型应用越来越多地迁移到云端，这些应用程序有能力也有动力根据云网络特性调整其数据传输时间表。我们发现黑盒网络抽象和数据密集型应用程序的适应性共同造成了不匹配，导致应用程序性能不佳。本文探讨了解决这种不匹配问题的白盒方法。我们提出了NetHint，一种云租户和云提供商之间的交互机制，共同增强应用程序性能。通过 NetHint，提供商提供了一个提示 - 底层网络特征的间接指示（例如，租户虚拟机的链路层网络拓扑、共置租户的数量、网络带宽利用率），然后租户的应用程序相应地调整其传输计划。 NetHint 设计为云租户提供了丰富的网络信息来计算其最佳传输计划，同时为云提供商收集和公开此信息带来了很少的开销。评估结果表明，NetHint 将 allreduce 完成时间、broadcast 完成时间和 MapReduce shuffle 完成时间的平均性能分别提高了 2.7 倍、1.5 倍和 1.2 倍。

items.title: Evolvable Network Telemetry at Facebook.
items.abstract: Network telemetry is essential for service availability and performance in large-scale production environments. While there is recent advent in novel measurement primitives and algorithms for network telemetry, a challenge that is not well studied is Change. Facebook runs fast-evolving networks to adapt to varying application requirements. Changes occur not only in the data collection and processing stages but also when interpreted and consumed by applications. In this paper, we present PCAT, a production change-aware telemetry system that handles changes in fast-evolving networks. We propose to use a change cube abstraction to systematically track changes, and an intent-based layering design to confine and track changes. By sharing our experiences with PCAT, we bring a new aspect to the monitoring research area: improving the adaptivity and evolvability of network telemetry.
items.abstract_zh: 网络遥测对于大规模生产环境中的服务可用性和性能至关重要。虽然最近出现了用于网络遥测的新颖测量原语和算法，但尚未充分研究的挑战是变化。 Facebook 运行快速发展的网络来适应不同的应用程序需求。变化不仅发生在数据收集和处理阶段，而且还发生在应用程序解释和使用时。在本文中，我们提出了 PCAT，一种生产变化感知遥测系统，可处理快速发展的网络中的变化。我们建议使用变更立方体抽象来系统地跟踪变更，并使用基于意图的分层设计来限制和跟踪变更。通过分享我们与 PCAT 的经验，我们为监测研究领域带来了一个新的方面：提高网络遥测的适应性和可进化性。

items.title: Differential Network Analysis.
items.abstract: Networks are constantly changing. To avoid outages, operators need to know whether prospective changes in a network's control plane will cause undesired changes in end-to-end forwarding behavior. For example, which pairs of end hosts are reachable before a configuration change but unreachable after the change? Control plane verifiers are ill-suited for answering such questions because they operate on a single snapshot to check its "compliance" with "explicitly specified" properties, instead of quantifying the "differences" in "affected" end-to-end forwarding behaviors. We argue for a new control plane analysis paradigm that makes differences first class citizens. Differential Network Analysis (DNA) takes control plane changes, incrementally computes control and data plane state, and outputs consequent differences in end-to-end behavior. We break the computation into three stages---control plane simulation, data plane modeling, and property checking---and leverage differential dataflow programming frameworks, incremental data plane verification, and customized graph algorithms, respectively, to make each stage incremental. Evaluations using both real and synthetic control plane changes demonstrate that DNA can compute the resulting differences in reachability in a few seconds---up to 3 orders of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art control plane verifiers.
items.abstract_zh: 网络在不断变化。为了避免中断，运营商需要知道网络控制平面的预期变化是否会导致端到端转发行为发生意外的变化。例如，哪些终端主机对在配置更改之前可以访问，但在更改之后就无法访问？控制平面验证器不适合回答此类问题，因为它们对单个快照进行操作以检查其与“明确指定”属性的“合规性”，而不是量化“受影响的”端到端转发行为中的“差异”。我们主张一种新的控制平面分析范式，使差异成为一等公民。差分网络分析 (DNA) 获取控制平面更改，增量计算控制和数据平面状态，并输出端到端行为的后续差异。我们将计算分为控制平面模拟、数据平面建模和属性检查三个阶段，并分别利用差分数据流编程框架、增量数据平面验证和定制图算法，使每个阶段都是增量的。使用真实和合成控制平面变化进行的评估表明，DNA 可以在几秒钟内计算出可达性的差异，比最先进的控制平面验证器快 3 个数量级。

items.title: PowerTCP: Pushing the Performance Limits of Datacenter Networks.
items.abstract: Increasingly stringent throughput and latency requirements in datacenter networks demand fast and accurate congestion control. We observe that the reaction time and accuracy of existing datacenter congestion control schemes are inherently limited. They either rely only on explicit feedback about the network state (e.g., queue lengths in DCTCP) or only on variations of state (e.g., RTT gradient in TIMELY). To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel congestion control algorithm, PowerTCP, which achieves much more fine-grained congestion control by adapting to the bandwidth-window product (henceforth called power). PowerTCP leverages in-band network telemetry to react to changes in the network instantaneously without loss of throughput and while keeping queues short. Due to its fast reaction time, our algorithm is particularly well-suited for dynamic network environments and bursty traffic patterns. We show analytically and empirically that PowerTCP can significantly outperform the state-of-the-art in both traditional datacenter topologies and emerging reconfigurable datacenters where frequent bandwidth changes make congestion control challenging. In traditional datacenter networks, PowerTCP reduces tail flow completion times of short flows by 80% compared to DCQCN and TIMELY, and by 33% compared to HPCC even at 60% network load. In reconfigurable datacenters, PowerTCP achieves 85% circuit utilization without incurring additional latency and cuts tail latency by at least 2x compared to existing approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心网络日益严格的吞吐量和延迟要求需要快速、准确的拥塞控制。我们观察到现有数据中心拥塞控制方案的反应时间和准确性本质上是有限的。它们要么仅依赖于有关网络状态的显式反馈（例如 DCTCP 中的队列长度），要么仅依赖于状态的变化（例如 TIMELY 中的 RTT 梯度）。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的拥塞控制算法 PowerTCP，它通过适应带宽窗口乘积（以下称为功率）来实现更细粒度的拥塞控制。 PowerTCP 利用带内网络遥测技术即时对网络变化做出反应，不会损失吞吐量，同时保持队列较短。由于其快速反应时间，我们的算法特别适合动态网络环境和突发流量模式。我们通过分析和经验证明，PowerTCP 可以显着优于传统数据中心拓扑和新兴可重构数据中心的最新技术，在这些数据中心中，频繁的带宽变化使拥塞控制具有挑战性。在传统数据中心网络中，即使在 60% 的网络负载下，PowerTCP 与 DCQCN 和 TIMELY 相比，也能将短流的尾流完成时间减少 80%，与 HPCC 相比，减少 33%。在可重新配置的数据中心中，PowerTCP 实现了 85% 的电路利用率，而不会产生额外的延迟，并且与现有方法相比，尾部延迟至少减少了 2 倍。

items.title: HeteroSketch: Coordinating Network-wide Monitoring in Heterogeneous and Dynamic Networks.
items.abstract: Network monitoring and measurement have always been critical components of network management. Recent developments in sketch-based monitoring techniques and the deployment opportunities arising from the increasing programmability of network elements (e.g., programmable switches, SmartNICs, and software switches) have made the possibility of accurate, detailed, network-wide telemetry tantalizingly within reach. However, the wide heterogeneity of the programmable hardware and dynamic changes in both resources available and resources needed for monitoring over time make existing approaches to network-wide monitoring impractical. We present HeteroSketch, a framework that consists of two main components: (1) a profiling tool that automatically quantifies the capabilities of arbitrary hardware by predicting their performance for sketching algorithms, and (2) an optimization framework that decides placement of measurement tasks and resource allocation for devices to meet monitoring goals while considering heterogeneous device capabilities. HeteroSketch enables optimized deployments for large networks (> 40,000 nodes) using a novel clustering approach and enables prompt responses to network topology, traffic, query, and resource dynamics. Our evaluation shows that HeteroSketch reduces resource overheads by 20-60% compared to prior art, while maintaining monitoring performance, coverage, and accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 网络监控和测量一直是网络管理的重要组成部分。基于草图的监控技术的最新发展以及网络元件（例如可编程交换机、SmartNIC 和软件交换机）可编程性的增加所带来的部署机会，使得准确、详细、全网络遥测变得触手可及。然而，可编程硬件的广泛异构性以及可用资源和监控所需资源随时间的动态变化使得现有的全网络监控方法变得不切实际。我们提出了 HeteroSketch，一个由两个主要组件组成的框架：（1）一个分析工具，通过预测草图算法的性能来自动量化任意硬件的功能；（2）一个优化框架，决定测量任务的放置和设备的资源分配，以满足监控目标，同时考虑异构设备的功能。 HeteroSketch 使用新颖的集群方法实现大型网络（> 40,000 个节点）的优化部署，并实现对网络拓扑、流量、查询和资源动态的快速响应。我们的评估表明，与现有技术相比，HeteroSketch 可减少 20-60% 的资源开销，同时保持监控性能、覆盖范围和准确性。

items.title: Bluebird: High-performance SDN for Bare-metal Cloud Services.
items.abstract: The bare-metal cloud service is a type of IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) that offers dedicated server hardware to customers along with access to other shared infrastructure in the cloud, including network and storage. This paper presents our experiences in designing, implementing, and deploying Bluebird, the high-performance network virtualization system for the bare-metal cloud service on Azure. Bluebird's data plane is built using high-performance programmable switch ASICs. This design allows us to ensure the high performance, scale, and custom forwarding capabilities necessary for network virtualization on Azure. Bluebird employs a few well-established technical principles in the control plane that ensure scalability and high availability, including route caching, device abstraction, and architectural decoupling of switch-local agents from a remote controller. The Bluebird system has been running on Azure for more than two years. During this time, it has served thousands of bare-metal tenant nodes and delivered full line-rate NIC speed of bare-metal servers of up to 100Gb/s while ensuring less than 1µs of maximum latency at each Bluebird-enabled SDN switch. We share our experiences of running bare-metal services on Azure, along with the P4 data plane program used in the Bluebird-enabled switches.
items.abstract_zh: 裸机云服务是一种 IaaS（基础设施即服务），为客户提供专用服务器硬件以及对云中其他共享基础设施（包括网络和存储）的访问。本文介绍了我们在设计、实施和部署 Bluebird（用于 Azure 上裸机云服务的高性能网络虚拟化系统）方面的经验。 Bluebird 的数据平面采用高性能可编程交换机 ASIC 构建。这种设计使我们能够确保 Azure 上网络虚拟化所需的高性能、规模和自定义转发功能。 Bluebird 在控制平面中采用了一些成熟的技术原理，以确保可扩展性和高可用性，包括路由缓存、设备抽象以及交换机本地代理与远程控制器的架构解耦。 Bluebird系统已经在Azure上运行了两年多。在此期间，它已为数千个裸机租户节点提供服务，并提供高达 100Gb/s 的裸机服务器全线速 NIC 速度，同时确保每个支持 Bluebird 的 SDN 交换机的最大延迟低于 1μs。我们分享在 Azure 上运行裸机服务的经验，以及支持 Bluebird 的交换机中使用的 P4 数据平面程序。

items.title: Katra: Realtime Verification for Multilayer Networks.
items.abstract: We present a new verification algorithm to efficiently and incrementally verify arbitrarily layered network data planes that are implemented using packet encapsulation and decapsulation. Inspired by work on model checking of pushdown systems for recursive programs, we develop a verification algorithm for networks consisting of stacks of headers. Our algorithm is based on a new technique that lazily "repairs" a decomposed stack of header sets on demand to account for cross-layer dependencies. We demonstrate how to integrate our approach with existing fast incremental data plane verifiers and have implemented our ideas in a tool called Katra. Evaluating Katra against an alternative approach based on equipping existing incremental verifiers to emulate finite header stacks, we show that Katra is between 5x-32x faster for packets with just 2 headers (layers), and that its performance advantage grows with both network size and layering.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的验证算法，可以有效地、增量地验证使用数据包封装和解封装实现的任意分层的网络数据平面。受到递归程序下推系统模型检查工作的启发，我们开发了一种用于由标头堆栈组成的网络的验证算法。我们的算法基于一种新技术，该技术可以根据需要延迟“修复”已分解的标头集堆栈，以解决跨层依赖性。我们演示了如何将我们的方法与现有的快速增量数据平面验证器集成，并在名为 Katra 的工具中实现了我们的想法。根据装备现有增量验证器模拟有限标头堆栈的替代方法来评估 Katra，我们发现 Katra 对于只有 2 个标头（层）的数据包速度提高了 5 倍到 32 倍，并且其性能优势随着网络规模和分层的增加而增长。

items.title: Ekya: Continuous Learning of Video Analytics Models on Edge Compute Servers.
items.abstract: Video analytics applications use edge compute servers for processing videos. Compressed models that are deployed on the edge servers for inference suffer from data drift where the live video data diverges from the training data. Continuous learning handles data drift by periodically retraining the models on new data. Our work addresses the challenge of jointly supporting inference and retraining tasks on edge servers, which requires navigating the fundamental tradeoff between the retrained model’s accuracy and the inference accuracy. Our solution Ekya balances this tradeoff across multiple models and uses a micro-profiler to identify the models most in need of retraining. Ekya’s accuracy gain compared to a baseline scheduler is 29% higher, and the baseline requires 4× more GPU resources to achieve the same accuracy as Ekya.
items.abstract_zh: 视频分析应用程序使用边缘计算服务器来处理视频。部署在边缘服务器上用于推理的压缩模型会受到数据漂移的影响，其中实时视频数据与训练数据存在偏差。持续学习通过定期根据新数据重新训练模型来处理数据漂移。我们的工作解决了在边缘服务器上联合支持推理和再训练任务的挑战，这需要在再训练模型的准确性和推理准确性之间进行基本权衡。我们的解决方案 Ekya 平衡了多个模型之间的这种权衡，并使用微分析器来识别最需要重新训练的模型。与基线调度程序相比，Ekya 的准确度增益高出 29%，并且基线需要多 4 倍的 GPU 资源才能达到与 Ekya 相同的准确度。

items.title: cISP: A Speed-of-Light Internet Service Provider.
items.abstract: Low latency is a requirement for a variety of interactive network applications. The Internet, however, is not optimized for latency. We thus explore the design of wide-area networks that move data at nearly the speed of light in vacuum. Our cISP design augments the Internet’s fiber with free-space microwave wireless connectivity over paths very close to great-circle paths. cISP addresses the fundamental challenge of simultaneously providing ultra-low latency while accounting for numerous practical factors ranging from transmission tower availability to packet queuing. We show that instantiations of cISP across the United States and Europe would achieve mean latencies within 5% of that achievable using great-circle paths at the speed of light, over medium and long distances. Further, using experiments conducted on a nearly-speed-of-light algorithmic trading network, together with an analysis of trading data at its end points, we show that microwave networks are reliably faster than fiber networks even in inclement weather. Finally, we estimate that the economic value of such networks would substantially exceed their expense.
items.abstract_zh: 低延迟是各种交互式网络应用的要求。然而，互联网并未针对延迟进行优化。因此，我们探索了在真空中以接近光速移动数据的广域网的设计。我们的 cISP 设计通过非常接近大圆路径的路径上的自由空间微波无线连接增强了互联网光纤。 cISP 解决了同时提供超低延迟的基本挑战，同时考虑了从传输塔可用性到数据包排队等众多实际因素。我们表明，美国和欧洲的 cISP 实例将在中长距离上以光速使用大圆路径实现的平均延迟控制在 5% 以内。此外，通过在接近光速的算法交易网络上进行的实验，以及对其端点交易数据的分析，我们表明，即使在恶劣天气下，微波网络也确实比光纤网络更快。最后，我们估计此类网络的经济价值将大大超过其费用。

items.title: Donar: Anonymous VoIP over Tor.
items.abstract: We present DONAR, a system enabling anonymous VoIP with good quality-of-experience (QoE) over Tor. No individual Tor link can match VoIP networking requirements. DONAR bridges this gap by spreading VoIP traffic over several links. It combines active performance monitoring, dynamic link selection, adaptive traffic scheduling, and redundancy at no extra bandwidth cost. DONAR enables high QoE: latency remains under 360 ms for 99% of VoIP packets during most (86%) 5-minute and 90-minute calls.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DONAR，这是一个通过 Tor 实现匿名 VoIP 且具有良好体验质量 (QoE) 的系统。没有任何单独的 Tor 链路能够满足 VoIP 网络要求。 DONAR 通过将 VoIP 流量分散到多个链路上来弥补这一差距。它结合了主动性能监控、动态链路选择、自适应流量调度和冗余，无需额外的带宽成本。 DONAR 可实现高 QoE：在大多数 (86%) 5 分钟和 90 分钟通话期间，99% 的 VoIP 数据包的延迟保持在 360 毫秒以下。

items.title: Privid: Practical, Privacy-Preserving Video Analytics Queries.
items.abstract: Analytics on video recorded by cameras in public areas have the potential to fuel many exciting applications, but also pose the risk of intruding on individuals’ privacy. Unfortunately, existing solutions fail to practically resolve this tension between utility and privacy, relying on perfect detection of all private information in each video frame—an elusive requirement. This paper presents: (1) a new notion of differential privacy (DP) for video analytics, ( ρ,K,ε )-event-duration privacy, which protects all private information visible for less than a particular duration, rather than relying on perfect detections of that information, and (2) a practical system called Privid that enforces duration-based privacy even with the (untrusted) analyst-provided deep neural networks that are commonplace for video analytics today. Across a variety of videos and queries, we show that Privid increases error by 1-21% relative to a non-private system.
items.abstract_zh: 对公共区域摄像头录制的视频进行分析有可能推动许多令人兴奋的应用，但也带来侵犯个人隐私的风险。不幸的是，现有的解决方案无法真正解决实用性和隐私之间的紧张关系，依赖于对每个视频帧中所有私人信息的完美检测——这是一个难以实现的要求。本文提出：(1) 用于视频分析的差分隐私 (DP) 新概念，(ρ,K,ε)-事件持续时间隐私，它保护在特定持续时间内可见的所有私人信息，而不是依赖于对该信息的完美检测，以及 (2) 一个名为 Privid 的实用系统，即使使用当今视频分析中常见的（不受信任的）分析师提供的深度神经网络，也可以强制执行基于持续时间的隐私。在各种视频和查询中，我们表明，相对于非私有系统，Privid 的错误增加了 1-21%。

items.title: Whisper: IoT in the TV White Space Spectrum.
items.abstract: The deployment of Internet of Things (IoT) networks has rapidly increased over recent years -- to connect homes, cities, farms, and many other industries. Today, these networks rely on connectivity solutions, such as LoRaWAN, operating in the ISM bands. Our experience from deployments in multiple countries has shown that such networks are bottlenecked by range and bandwidth. Therefore, we propose a new connectivity solution operating in TV White Space (TVWS) spectrum, where narrowband devices configured for IoT can opportunistically transmit data, while protecting incumbents from receiving harmful interference. The lower frequency of operation extends the range by a factor of five over ISM bands. In less-densely populated area where larger swaths of such bandwidth are available, TVWS-based IoT networks can support many more devices simultaneously and larger transmission size per device. Our early experimental field work was incorporated into a petition to the US FCC, and further work influenced the subsequent regulations permitting the use of IoT devices in TVWS. We highlight the technical challenges and our solutions involved in deploying IoT devices in the shared spectrum and complying with the FCC rules.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，物联网 (IoT) 网络的部署迅速增加，以连接家庭、城市、农场和许多其他行业。如今，这些网络依赖于在 ISM 频段运行的连接解决方​​案，例如 LoRaWAN。我们在多个国家的部署经验表明，此类网络受到范围和带宽的瓶颈。因此，我们提出了一种在电视空白频段 (TVWS) 频谱中运行的新连接解决方​​案，其中为物联网配置的窄带设备可以适时传输数据，同时保护现有设备免受有害干扰。较低的工作频率使 ISM 频段的范围扩大了五倍。在人口密度较低的地区，可以提供更大的带宽，基于 TVWS 的物联网网络可以同时支持更多的设备，并且每个设备的传输规模更大。我们早期的实验现场工作已纳入向美国 FCC 提交的请愿书中，进一步的工作影响了随后允许在 TVWS 中使用物联网设备的法规。我们重点介绍在共享频谱中部署物联网设备并遵守 FCC 规则所涉及的技术挑战和解决方案。

items.title: Starlight: Fast Container Provisioning on the Edge and over the WAN.
items.abstract: Containers, originally designed for cloud environments, are increasingly popular for provisioning workers outside the cloud, for example in mobile and edge computing. These settings, however, bring new challenges: high latency links, limited bandwidth, and resource-constrained workers. The result is longer provisioning times when deploying new workers or updating existing ones, much of it due to network traffic. Our analysis shows that current piecemeal approaches to reducing provisioning time are not always sufficient, and can even make things worse as round-trip times grow. Rather, we find that the very same layer-based structure that makes containers easy to develop and use also makes it more difficult to optimize deployment. Addressing this issue thus requires rethinking the container deployment pipeline as a whole. Based on our findings, we present Starlight: an accelerator for container provisioning. Starlight decouples provisioning from development by redesigning the container deployment protocol, filesystem, and image storage format. Our evaluation using 21 popular containers shows that, on average, Starlight deploys and starts containers 3.0x faster than the current state-of-the-art implementation while incurring no runtime overhead and little (5%) storage overhead. Finally, it is backwards compatible with existing workers and uses standard container registries.
items.abstract_zh: 容器最初是为云环境设计的，现在越来越受到云外配置工作人员的欢迎，例如在移动和边缘计算中。然而，这些设置带来了新的挑战：高延迟链路、有限的带宽和资源受限的工作人员。结果是部署新工作人员或更新现有工作人员时的配置时间更长，其中大部分是由于网络流量造成的。我们的分析表明，当前减少配置时间的零碎方法并不总是足够的，而且随着往返时间的增长，甚至可能使情况变得更糟。相反，我们发现，使容器易于开发和使用的基于层的结构也使优化部署变得更加困难。因此，解决这个问题需要重新思考整个容器部署管道。根据我们的发现，我们推出了 Starlight：容器配置加速器。 Starlight 通过重新设计容器部署协议、文件系统和映像存储格式，将配置与开发分离。我们使用 21 个流行容器进行的评估表明，平均而言，Starlight 部署和启动容器的速度比当前最先进的实现快 3.0 倍，同时不会产生运行时开销和很少 (5%) 的存储开销。最后，它向后兼容现有的工作人员并使用标准容器注册表。

items.title: Swift: Adaptive Video Streaming with Layered Neural Codecs.
items.abstract: Layered video coding compresses video segments into layers(additional code bits). Decoding with each additional layer improves video quality incrementally. This approach has potential for very fine-grained rate adaptation. However, layered coding has not seen much success in practice because of its cross-layer compression overheads and decoding latencies.We take a fresh new approach to layered video coding by exploiting recent advances in video coding using deep learning techniques. We develop Swift, an adaptive video streaming system that includes i) a layered encoder that learns to encode a video frame into layered codes by purely encoding residuals from previous layers without introducing any cross-layer compression overheads, ii) a decoder that can fuse together a subset of these codes (based on availability) and decode the mall in one go, and, iii) an adaptive bit rate (ABR) protocol that synergistically adapts video quality based on available network and client-side compute capacity. Swift can be integrated easily in the current streaming ecosystem without any change to network protocols and applications by simply replacing the current codecs with the proposed layered neural video codec when appropriate GPU or similar accelerator functionality is available on the client side. Extensive evaluations reveal Swift’s multi-dimensional benefits over prior video streaming systems.
items.abstract_zh: 分层视频编码将视频片段压缩成层（附加码位）。每个附加层的解码都会逐渐提高视频质量。这种方法具有非常细粒度的速率适应的潜力。然而，由于其跨层压缩开销和解码延迟，分层编码在实践中并未取得太大成功。我们通过利用深度学习技术在视频编码方面的最新进展，采用了一种全新的分层视频编码方法。我们开发了 Swift，一种自适应视频流系统，其中包括：i）分层编码器，通过纯粹编码前一层的残差来学习将视频帧编码为分层代码，而不引入任何跨层压缩开销；ii）解码器，可以将这些代码的子集（基于可用性）融合在一起并一次性解码；iii）自适应比特率（ABR）协议，根据可用网络和客户端计算能力协同调整视频质量。当客户端提供适当的 GPU 或类似的加速器功能时，只需将当前的编解码器替换为建议的分层神经视频编解码器，Swift 就可以轻松集成到当前的流媒体生态系统中，而无需对网络协议和应用程序进行任何更改。广泛的评估揭示了 Swift 相对于之前的视频流系统的多维优势。

items.title: Yeti: Stateless and Generalized Multicast Forwarding.
items.abstract: Current multicast forwarding systems suffer from large state requirements at routers and high communication overheads. In addition, these systems do not support generalized multicast forwarding, where traffic needs to pass through traffic-engineered paths or requires service chaining. We propose a new system, called Yeti, to efficiently implement generalized multicast forwarding inside ISP networks and supports various forwarding requirements. Yeti completely eliminates the state at routers. Yeti consists of two components: centralized controller and packet processing algorithm. We propose an algorithm for the controller to create labels that represent generalized multicast graphs. The controller instructs an ingress router to attach the created labels to packets in the multicast session. We propose an efficient packet processing algorithm at routers to process labels of incoming packets and forwards them accordingly. We prove the correctness and efficiency of Yeti. In addition, we assess the performance of Yeti in a hardware testbed and using simulations. Our experimental results show that Yeti can efficiently support high speed links. Furthermore, we compare Yeti using real ISP topologies in simulations against the closest systems in the literature: a rule-based approach (built on top of OpenFlow) and two label-based systems. Our simulation results show substantial improvements compared to these systems. For example, Yeti reduces the label overhead by 65.3%, on average, compared to the closest label-based multicast approach in the literature.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的组播转发系统面临着路由器的大量状态要求和高通信开销。此外，这些系统不支持通用组播转发，其中流量需要通过流量工程路径或需要服务链。我们提出了一个名为 Yeti 的新系统，用于在 ISP 网络内高效实现通用组播转发并支持各种转发要求。 Yeti 完全消除了路由器的状态。 Yeti 由两个组件组成：集中控制器和数据包处理算法。我们提出了一种控制器算法来创建表示广义多播图的标签。控制器指示入口路由器将创建的标签附加到多播会话中的数据包。我们在路由器上提出了一种有效的数据包处理算法来处理传入数据包的标签并相应地转发它们。我们证明了 Yeti 的正确性和效率。此外，我们还使用硬件测试台和模拟来评估 Yeti 的性能。我们的实验结果表明 Yeti 可以有效地支持高速链接。此外，我们将在模拟中使用真实 ISP 拓扑的 Yeti 与文献中最接近的系统进行比较：基于规则的方法（构建在 OpenFlow 之上）和两个基于标签的系统。我们的模拟结果显示与这些系统相比有显着的改进。例如，与文献中最接近的基于标签的多播方法相比，Yeti 平均将标签开销减少了 65.3%。

items.title: Orca: Server-assisted Multicast for Datacenter Networks.
items.abstract: Group communications appear in various large-scale datacenter applications. These applications, however, do not currently benefit from multicast, despite its potential substantial savings in network and processing resources. This is because current multicast systems do not scale and they impose considerable state and communication overheads. We propose a new architecture, called Orca, that addresses the challenges of multicast in datacenter networks. Orca divides the state and tasks of the data plane among switches and servers, and it partially offloads the management of multicast sessions to servers. Orca significantly reduces the state at switches, minimizes the bandwidth overhead, incurs small and constant processing overhead, and does not limit the size of multicast sessions. We implemented Orca in a testbed to demonstrate its performance in terms of throughput, consumption of server resources, packet latency, and the impact of server failures. We also implemented a sample multicast application in our testbed, and showed that Orca can substantially reduce its communication time, through optimizing the data transfer between nodes using multicast instead of unicast. In addition, we simulated a datacenter consisting of 27,648 hosts and handling 1M multicast sessions, and we compared Orca versus the state-of-art system in the literature. Our results show that Orca reduces the switch state by up to two orders of magnitude, the communication overhead by up to 19X, and the control overhead by up to 14X, compared to the state-of-art.
items.abstract_zh: 群组通信出现在各种大型数据中心应用中。然而，这些应用程序目前并没有从多播中受益，尽管多播可能会大大节省网络和处理资源。这是因为当前的多播系统无法扩展，并且会带来相当大的状态和通信开销。我们提出了一种名为 Orca 的新架构，可以解决数据中心网络中多播的挑战。 Orca 在交换机和服务器之间划分数据平面的状态和任务，并将组播会话的管理部分卸载给服务器。 Orca 显着减少了交换机的状态，最大限度地减少了带宽开销，产生小而恒定的处理开销，并且不限制多播会话的大小。我们在测试台中实现了 Orca，以展示其在吞吐量、服务器资源消耗、数据包延迟以及服务器故障影响方面的性能。我们还在测试台中实现了一个示例多播应用程序，并表明 Orca 可以通过使用多播而不是单播优化节点之间的数据传输来显着减少其通信时间。此外，我们还模拟了一个由 27,648 台主机组成并处理 1M 多播会话的数据中心，并将 Orca 与文献中最先进的系统进行了比较。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，Orca 将开关状态减少了两个数量级，通信开销减少了 19 倍，控制开销减少了 14 倍。

items.title: Check-N-Run: a Checkpointing System for Training Deep Learning Recommendation Models.
items.abstract: Checkpoints play an important role in training long running machine learning (ML) models. Checkpoints take a snapshot of an ML model and store it in a non-volatile memory so that they can be used to recover from failures to ensure rapid training progress. In addition, they are used for online training to improve inference prediction accuracy with continuous learning. Given the large and ever-increasing model sizes, checkpoint frequency is often bottlenecked by the storage write bandwidth and capacity. When checkpoints are maintained on remote storage, as is the case with many industrial settings, they are also bottlenecked by network bandwidth. We present Check-N-Run, a scalable checkpointing system for training large ML models at Facebook. While Check-N-Run is applicable to long running ML jobs, we focus on checkpointing recommendation models which are currently the largest ML models with Terabytes of model size. Check-N-Run uses two primary techniques to address the size and bandwidth challenges. First, it applies differential checkpointing, which tracks and checkpoints the modified part of the model. Differential checkpointing is particularly valuable in the context of recommendation models where only a fraction of the model (stored as embedding tables) is updated on each iteration. Second, Check-N-Run leverages quantization techniques to significantly reduce the checkpoint size, without degrading training accuracy. These techniques allow Check-N-Run to reduce the required write bandwidth by 6-17x and the required capacity by 2.5-8xon real-world models at Facebook, and thereby significantly improve checkpoint capabilities while reducing the total cost of ownership.
items.abstract_zh: 检查点在训练长期运行的机器学习 (ML) 模型中发挥着重要作用。检查点拍摄 ML 模型的快照并将其存储在非易失性存储器中，以便它们可用于从故障中恢复，以确保快速的训练进度。此外，它们还用于在线训练，通过持续学习来提高推理预测的准确性。鉴于模型规模庞大且不断增加，检查点频率通常受到存储写入带宽和容量的瓶颈。当检查点维护在远程存储上时（就像许多工业设置的情况一样），它们也会受到网络带宽的瓶颈。我们推出了 Check-N-Run，这是一个可扩展的检查点系统，用于在 Facebook 训练大型 ML 模型。虽然 Check-N-Run 适用于长时间运行的 ML 作业，但我们专注于检查点推荐模型，这是目前最大的 ML 模型，模型大小为 TB。 Check-N-Run 使用两种主要技术来解决大小和带宽挑战。首先，它应用差异检查点，跟踪和检查模型的修改部分。差异检查点在推荐模型的上下文中特别有价值，其中每次迭代仅更新模型的一小部分（存储为嵌入表）。其次，Check-N-Run 利用量化技术显着减小检查点大小，而不会降低训练准确性。这些技术使 Check-N-Run 能够将 Facebook 真实模型所需的写入带宽降低 6-17 倍，将所需容量降低 2.5-8 倍，从而显着提高检查点功能，同时降低总体拥有成本。

items.title: Enabling In-situ Programmability in Network Data Plane: From Architecture to Language.
items.abstract: In-situ programmability refers to the capability for network devices to update data plane functions and protocol processing logic at runtime without interrupting the services, driven by dynamic and interactive network operations towards autonomous networks. The existing programmable switch architecture (e.g., PISA) and programming language (e.g., P4) were designed for monolithic and static implementation, which requires a complete programming and deployment cycle for functional update, incurring long delay and service interruption. Addressing the fundamental reasons for such inflexibility, we design a new In-situ Programmable Switch Architecture (IPSA) and the corresponding design flow using rP4, a P4 language extension, as a fix. The compiler contains algorithms to support efficient resource mapping for both base design and incremental updates. To manifest the in-situ programming feasibility, we demonstrate several practical use cases on both a software switch, ipbm, and an FPGA-based prototype. Our experiments and analysis show that IPSA incurs moderate hardware cost which can be justified by its benefits and compensated by newer chip technologies. The in-situ programmability enabled by IPSA and rP4 advances the state of the art of programmable networks and opens a promising new design space.
items.abstract_zh: 原位可编程性是指网络设备在运行时更新数据平面功能和协议处理逻辑而不中断服务的能力，由面向自治网络的动态和交互式网络操作驱动。现有的可编程交换机架构（例如PISA）和编程语言（例如P4）都是为单片和静态实现而设计的，这需要完整的编程和部署周期来进行功能更新，从而导致较长的延迟和服务中断。针对这种不灵活性的根本原因，我们设计了一种新的原位可编程交换机架构 (IPSA) 以及使用 P4 语言扩展 rP4 的相应设计流程作为修复。该编译器包含支持基本设计和增量更新的高效资源映射的算法。为了证明现场编程的可行性，我们在软件交换机、ipbm 和基于 FPGA 的原型上演示了几个实际用例。我们的实验和分析表明，IPSA 会产生适中的硬件成本，这可以通过其优势来证明是合理的，并可以通过更新的芯片技术进行补偿。 IPSA 和 rP4 实现的原位可编程性推进了可编程网络的最先进水平，并开辟了充满希望的新设计空间。

items.title: Gearbox: A Hierarchical Packet Scheduler for Approximate Weighted Fair Queuing.
items.abstract: Bandwidth allocation and performance isolation are crucial to achieving network virtualization and guaranteeing service quality in data centers as well as other network systems. Weighted Fair Queuing (WFQ) can achieve customized bandwidth allocation and flow isolation; however, its implementation in large-scale high-speed network systems is very challenging due to the high complexity of the scheduling and the large number of queues required. This paper proposes Gearbox, a scheduler primitive for next-generation programmable switches and smart NICs that practically approximates WFQ. Gearbox consists of a logical hierarchy of queuing levels, which accommodate a wide range of packet departure times using a relatively small number of FIFOs. Gearbox's enqueue and dequeue operations have O(1) time complexity, which makes it suitable to cope with high-speed line rates. Gearbox provides its simplicity and performance advantages by allowing slight discrepancies in packet departure time from strict WFQ. We show that Gearbox's normalized departure time discrepancy is bounded and has a negligible impact on bandwidth allocation and flow completion time (FCT). We implement Gearbox in NS2 and in VHDL, targeted to a Xilinx Alveo U250 card with an XCVU13P FPGA. The NS2 evaluation results show that Gearbox closely approximates WFQ and achieves weighted max-min fairness in bandwidth allocation as well as flow isolation. Gearbox provides FCT performance comparable to ideal WFQ. The Gearbox FPGA prototype runs at 350MHz and achieves full line rate for 100GbE with packets larger than 123 bytes. Gearbox consumes less than 1% of the FPGA's logic resources and less than 4% of its internal block memory.
items.abstract_zh: 带宽分配和性能隔离对于数据中心及其他网络系统实现网络虚拟化和保证服务质量至关重要。加权公平队列（WFQ）可以实现定制化的带宽分配和流量隔离；然而，由于调度复杂度高、需要大量队列，其在大规模高速网络系统中的实现非常具有挑战性。本文提出了 Gearbox，一种用于下一代可编程交换机和智能 NIC 的调度器原语，实际上类似于 WFQ。 Gearbox 由排队级别的逻辑层次结构组成，它使用相对较少数量的 FIFO 来适应各种数据包出发时间。 Gearbox的入队和出队操作具有O(1)的时间复杂度，这使得它适合应对高速线速率。 Gearbox 通过允许数据包离开时间与严格的 WFQ 略有差异，提供了简单性和性能优势。我们表明 Gearbox 的标准化出发时间差异是有界的，并且对带宽分配和流完成时间 (FCT) 的影响可以忽略不计。我们在 NS2 和 VHDL 中实现 Gearbox，目标是带有 XCVU13P FPGA 的 Xilinx Alveo U250 卡。 NS2 评估结果表明，Gearbox 非常接近 WFQ，并在带宽分配和流量隔离方面实现了加权最大最小公平性。 Gearbox 提供与理想 WFQ 相当的 FCT 性能。 Gearbox FPGA 原型运行频率为 350MHz，可实现 100GbE 的全线速，且数据包大于 123 字节。 Gearbox 消耗的 FPGA 逻辑资源不到 1%，其内部块存储器不到 4%。

items.title: Buffer-based End-to-end Request Event Monitoring in the Cloud.
items.abstract: Request latency is a crucial concern for modern cloud providers. Due to various causes in hosts and networks, requests can suffer from request latency anomalies (RLAs), which may violate the Service-Level Agreement for tenants. However, existing performance monitoring tools have incomplete coverage and inconsistent semantics for monitoring requests, resulting in the difficulty to accurately diagnose RLAs. This paper presents BufScope, a high-coverage request event monitoring system, which aims to capture most RLA-related events with consistent request-level semantics in the end-to-end datapath of request. BufScope models the datapath of request as a buffer chain and defines RLA-related events based on different properties of buffers, so as to end-to-end monitor the root causes of RLA. To achieve consistent semantics for captured events, BufScope designs a concise request-level semantic injection mechanism to make events captured in networks have the victim requests' ID, and offloads the realization to SmartNICs for low overhead . We have implemented BufScope on commodity SmartNICs and programmable switches. Evaluation results show that BufScope can diagnose 95% RLAs with <0.07% network bandwidth overhead and <1% application throughput decline.
items.abstract_zh: 请求延迟是现代云提供商面临的一个重要问题。由于主机和网络的各种原因，请求可能会出现请求延迟异常（RLA），这可能违反租户的服务级别协议。然而，现有的性能监控工具对监控请求的覆盖不完全、语义不一致，导致难以准确诊断RLA。本文提出了BufScope，一个高覆盖率的请求事件监控系统，旨在捕获请求的端到端数据路径中具有一致的请求级语义的大多数RLA相关事件。 BufScope将请求的数据路径建模为缓冲链，并根据缓冲区的不同属性定义RLA相关事件，从而端到端监控RLA的根本原因。为了使捕获的事件实现一致的语义，BufScope设计了一种简洁的请求级语义注入机制，使网络中捕获的事件具有受害者请求的ID，并将实现卸载到SmartNIC以降低开销。我们已在商用 SmartNIC 和可编程交换机上实施了 BufScope。评估结果表明，BufScope 可以诊断 95% 的 RLA，网络带宽开销 <0.07%，应用程序吞吐量下降 <1%。

items.title: Learning to Communicate Effectively Between Battery-free Devices.
items.abstract: Successful wireless communication requires that sender and receiver are operational at the same time. This requirement is difficult to satisfy in battery-free networks, where the energy harvested from ambient sources varies across time and space and is often too weak to continuously power the devices. We present Bonito, the first connection protocol for battery-free systems that enables reliable and efficient bi-directional communication between intermittently powered nodes. We collect and analyze real-world energy-harvesting traces from five diverse scenarios involving solar panels and piezoelectric harvesters, and find that the nodes' charging times approximately follow well-known distributions. Bonito learns a model of these distributions online and adapts the nodes' wake-up times so that sender and receiver are operational at the same time, enabling successful communication. Experiments with battery-free prototype nodes built from off-the-shelf hardware components demonstrate that our design improves the average throughput by 10-80× compared with the state of the art.
items.abstract_zh: 成功的无线通信需要发送器和接收器同时运行。这一要求在无电池网络中很难满足，因为在无电池网络中，从环境来源收集的能量随时间和空间的不同而变化，并且通常太弱而无法为设备持续供电。我们推出 Bonito，这是第一个用于无电池系统的连接协议，可在间歇供电的节点之间实现可靠且高效的双向通信。我们收集并分析了涉及太阳能电池板和压电采集器的五种不同场景的真实能量采集痕迹，发现节点的充电时间大致遵循众所周知的分布。 Bonito 在线学习这些分布的模型，并调整节点的唤醒时间，以便发送者和接收者同时运行，从而实现成功的通信。对由现成硬件组件构建的无电池原型节点进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，我们的设计将平均吞吐量提高了 10-80 倍。

items.title: Packet Order Matters! Improving Application Performance by Deliberately Delaying Packets.
items.abstract: Data centers increasingly deploy commodity servers with high-speed network interfaces to enable low-latency communication. However, achieving low latency at high data rates crucially depends on how the incoming traffic interacts with the system's caches. When packets that need to be processed in the same way are consecutive, i.e., exhibit high temporal and spatial locality, caches deliver great benefits. In this paper, we systematically study the impact of temporal and spatial traffic locality on the performance of commodity servers equipped with high-speed network interfaces. Our results show that (i) the performance of a variety of widely deployed applications degrade substantially with even the slightest lack of traffic locality, and (ii) a traffic trace from our organization reveals poor traffic locality as networking protocols, drivers, and the underlying switching/routing fabric spread packets out in time (reducing locality). To address these issues, we built Reframer, a software solution that deliberately delays packets and reorders them to increase traffic locality. Despite introducing μs-scale delays of some packets, we show that Reframer increases the throughput of a network service chain by up to 84% and reduces the flow completion time of a web server by 11% while improving its throughput by 20%.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心越来越多地部署具有高速网络接口的商用服务器，以实现低延迟通信。然而，在高数据速率下实现低延迟关键取决于传入流量如何与系统缓存交互。当需要以相同方式处理的数据包是连续的（即表现出高时间和空间局部性）时，缓存会带来巨大的好处。在本文中，我们系统地研究了时间和空间流量局部性对配备高速网络接口的商品服务器性能的影响。我们的结果表明，(i) 各种广泛部署的应用程序的性能会大幅下降，即使是最轻微的流量局部性缺失，以及 (ii) 我们组织的流量跟踪显示，由于网络协议、驱动程序和底层交换/路由结构及时传播数据包（减少局部性），流量局部性较差。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了 Reframer，这是一种软件解决方案，可以故意延迟数据包并对它们重新排序以增加流量局部性。尽管引入了一些数据包的微秒级延迟，但我们表明，Reframer 将网络服务链的吞吐量提高了 84%，并将 Web 服务器的流完成时间减少了 11%，同时将其吞吐量提高了 20%。

items.title: Aquila: A unified, low-latency fabric for datacenter networks.
items.abstract: Datacenter workloads have evolved from the data intensive, loosely-coupled workloads of the past decade to more tightly coupled ones, wherein ultra-low latency communication is essential for resource disaggregation over the network and to enable emerging programming models. We introduce Aquila , an experimental datacenter network fabric built with ultra-low latency support as a first-class design goal, while also supporting traditional datacenter traffic. Aquila uses a new Layer 2 cell-based protocol, GNet, an integrated switch, and a custom ASIC with low-latency Remote Memory Access (RMA) capabilities co-designed with GNet. We demonstrate that Aquila is able to achieve under 40 microseconds tail fabric Round Trip Time (RTT) for IP traffic and sub-10 microseconds RMA execution time across hundreds of host machines, even in the presence of background throughput-oriented IP traffic. This translates to more than 5x reduction in tail latency for a production quality key-value store running on a prototype Aquila network.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心工作负载已经从过去十年的数据密集型、松散耦合工作负载演变为更紧密耦合的工作负载，其中超低延迟通信对于网络上的资源分解和启用新兴编程模型至关重要。我们推出 Aquila，这是一种实验性的数据中心网络结构，以超低延迟支持作为一流的设计目标，同时还支持传统的数据中心流量。 Aquila 使用新的基于第 2 层单元的协议 GNet、集成交换机以及与 GNet 共同设计的具有低延迟远程内存访问 (RMA) 功能的定制 ASIC。我们证明，即使存在以吞吐量为导向的后台 IP 流量，Aquila 也能够在数百台主机上实现低于 40 微秒的尾部结构往返时间 (RTT) 和低于 10 微秒的 RMA 执行时间。这意味着在原型 Aquila 网络上运行的生产质量键值存储的尾部延迟减少了 5 倍以上。

items.title: Backpressure Flow Control.
items.abstract: Effective congestion control for data center networks is becoming increasingly challenging with a growing amount of latency-sensitive traffic, much fatter links, and extremely bursty traffic. Widely deployed algorithms, such as DCTCP and DCQCN, are still far from optimal in many plausible scenarios, particularly for tail latency. Many operators compensate by running their networks at low average utilization, dramatically increasing costs. In this paper, we argue that we have reached the practical limits of end-to-end congestion control. Instead, we propose, implement, and evaluate a new congestion control architecture called Backpressure Flow Control (BFC). BFC provides per-hop per-flow flow control, but with bounded state, constant-time switch operations, and careful use of buffers and queues. We demonstrate BFC’s feasibility by implementing it on Tofino2, a state-of-the-art P4-based programmable hardware switch. In simulation, we show that BFC achieves near optimal throughput and tail latency behavior even under challenging conditions such as high network load and incast cross traffic. Compared to deployed end-to-end schemes, BFC achieves 2.3 - 60× lower tail latency for short flows and 1.6 - 5× better average completion time for long flows.
items.abstract_zh: 随着对延迟敏感的流量不断增加、链路变得越来越宽以及流量极其突发，数据中心网络的有效拥塞控制变得越来越具有挑战性。广泛部署的算法（例如 DCTCP 和 DCQCN）在许多可能的场景中仍然远非最佳，特别是对于尾部延迟。许多运营商通过以较低的平均利用率运行网络来补偿，这大大增加了成本。在本文中，我们认为我们已经达到了端到端拥塞控制的实际极限。相反，我们提出、实施和评估一种称为背压流控制（BFC）的新拥塞控制架构。 BFC 提供每跳每流的流量控制，但具有有界状态、恒定时间切换操作以及对缓冲区和队列的谨慎使用。我们通过在 Tofino2（一种最先进的基于 P4 的可编程硬件交换机）上实施 BFC 来证明其可行性。在仿真中，我们表明，即使在高网络负载和组播交叉流量等具有挑战性的条件下，BFC 也能实现接近最佳的吞吐量和尾部延迟行为。与已部署的端到端方案相比，BFC 的短流尾部延迟降低了 2.3 - 60 倍，长流的平均完成时间提高了 1.6 - 5 倍。

items.title: Cocktail: A Multidimensional Optimization for Model Serving in Cloud.
items.abstract: With a growing demand for adopting ML models for a variety of application services, it is vital that the frameworks serving these models are capable of delivering highly accurate predictions with minimal latency along with reduced deployment costs in a public cloud environment. Despite high latency, prior works in this domain are crucially limited by the accuracy offered by individual models. Intuitively, model ensembling can address the accuracy gap by intelligently combining different models in parallel. However, selecting the appropriate models dynamically at runtime to meet the desired accuracy with low latency at minimal deployment cost is a nontrivial problem. Towards this, we propose Cocktail, a cost effective ensembling-based model serving framework. Cocktail comprises of two key components: (i) a dynamic model selection framework, which reduces the number of models in the ensemble, while satisfying the accuracy and latency requirements; (ii) an adaptive resource management (RM) framework that employs a distributed proactive autoscaling policy combined with importance sampling, to efficiently allocate resources for the models. The RM framework leverages transient virtual machine (VM) instances to reduce the deployment cost in a public cloud. A prototype implementation of Cocktail on the AWS EC2 platform and exhaustive evaluations using a variety of workloads demonstrate that {Cocktail} can reduce deployment cost by 1.45x, while providing 2x reduction in latency and satisfying the target accuracy for up to 96% of the requests, when compared to state-of-the-art model-serving frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 随着各种应用程序服务采用机器学习模型的需求不断增长，服务这些模型的框架必须能够以最小的延迟提供高度准确的预测，并降低公共云环境中的部署成本，这一点至关重要。尽管延迟很高，但该领域的先前工作受到各个模型提供的准确性的严重限制。直观地说，模型集成可以通过智能地并行组合不同模型来解决准确性差距。然而，在运行时动态选择适当的模型以满足所需的精度、低延迟和最小的部署成本是一个不小的问题。为此，我们提出了 Cocktail，一种具有成本效益的基于集成的模型服务框架。 Cocktail 由两个关键组件组成：(i) 动态模型选择框架，减少集成中模型的数量，同时满足精度和延迟要求； (ii) 自适应资源管理 (RM) 框架，采用分布式主动自动缩放策略与重要性采样相结合，为模型有效分配资源。 RM 框架利用瞬态虚拟机 (VM) 实例来降低公共云中的部署成本。 AWS EC2 平台上 Cocktail 的原型实现以及使用各种工作负载的详尽评估表明，与最先进的模型服务框架相比，{Cocktail} 可以将部署成本降低 1.45 倍，同时将延迟降低 2 倍，并满足高达 96% 的请求的目标准确性。

items.title: Saiyan: Design and Implementation of a Low-power Demodulator for LoRa Backscatter Systems.
items.abstract: The radio range of backscatter systems continues growing as new wireless communication primitives are continuously invented. Nevertheless, both the bit error rate and the packet loss rate of backscatter signals increase rapidly with the radio range, thereby necessitating the cooperation between the access point and the backscatter tags through a feedback loop. Unfortunately, the low-power nature of backscatter tags limits their ability to demodulate feedback signals from a remote access point and scales down to such circumstances. This paper presents Saiyan, an ultra-low-power demodulator for long-range LoRa backscatter systems. With Saiyan, a backscatter tag can demodulate feedback signals from a remote access point with moderate power consumption and then perform an immediate packet re-transmission in the presence of packet loss. Moreover, Saiyan enables rate adaption and channel hopping – two PHY-layer operations that are important to channel efficiency yet unavailable on long-range backscatter systems. We prototype Saiyan on a two-layer PCB board and evaluate its performance in different environments. Results show that Saiyan achieves 3.5–5x gain on the demodulation range, compared with state-of-the-art systems. Our ASIC simulation shows that the power consumption of Saiyan is around 93.2 μW. Code and hardware schematics can be found at: https://github.com/ZangJac/Saiyan .
items.abstract_zh: 随着新的无线通信原语的不断发明，反向散射系统的无线电范围不断扩大。然而，反向散射信号的误码率和丢包率随着无线电范围的增加而迅速增加，因此需要接入点和反向散射标签之间通过反馈环路进行配合。不幸的是，反向散射标签的低功耗特性限制了它们解调来自远程接入点的反馈信号并按比例缩小到这种情况的能力。本文介绍了 Saiyan，一种用于远程 LoRa 反向散射系统的超低功耗解调器。借助 Saiyan，反向散射标签可以以适度的功耗解调来自远程接入点的反馈信号，然后在出现数据包丢失的情况下立即执行数据包重传。此外，Saiyan 还支持速率自适应和信道跳跃——这两种 PHY 层操作对于信道效率很重要，但在远程反向散射系统上不可用。我们在两层 PCB 板上制作 Saiyan 原型，并评估其在不同环境下的性能。结果表明，与最先进的系统相比，Saiyan 在解调范围上实现了 3.5-5 倍的增益。我们的 ASIC 仿真显示 Saiyan 的功耗约为 93.2 μW。代码和硬件原理图可以在：https://github.com/ZangJac/Saiyan 找到。

items.title: How to diagnose nanosecond network latencies in rich end-host stacks.
items.abstract: Low-latency network stacks have brought down network latencies within end-hosts to the microsecond-regime . However, end-host profilers have such high overheads that they are useful only to confirm a hypothesis, not to diagnose a problem in the first place. Indeed, every one of twenty low-latency network projects we surveyed rolled their own analysis tools instead of using an existing profiler. This paper shows how to build a latency diagnosis tool with full-stack coverage and low overhead that can identify, not just confirm, sources of latency in end hosts. The unique measurement methodology reconstructs network-message lifetimes within end hosts with nanosecond precision, by reconciling CPU and NIC hardware profiling traces across multiple time domains (network and CPU). It uncovers unexpected latency sources in both kernel and user-space stacks. We demonstrate these capabilities by using our implementation, NSight, to systematically identify and remove performance overheads in memcached, reducing 99.9th percentile latency by a factor of 40 from 2:2 ms to 41 μs.
items.abstract_zh: 低延迟网络堆栈已将终端主机内的网络延迟降低至微秒级。然而，终端主机分析器的开销如此之高，以至于它们只能用于确认假设，而不能首先诊断问题。事实上，我们调查的二十个低延迟网络项目中，每一个都推出了自己的分析工具，而不是使用现有的分析器。本文展示了如何构建一个具有全栈覆盖和低开销的延迟诊断工具，该工具可以识别（而不仅仅是确认）终端主机中的延迟来源。独特的测量方法通过跨多个时域（网络和 CPU）协调 CPU 和 NIC 硬件分析跟踪，以纳秒精度重建终端主机内的网络消息生命周期。它发现了内核和用户空间堆栈中意外的延迟源。我们通过使用我们的实现 NSight 来系统地识别和消除 memcached 中的性能开销，从而将 99.9% 的延迟减少 40 倍，从 2:2 毫秒减少到 41 微秒，从而展示了这些功能。

items.title: Modular Switch Programming Under Resource Constraints.
items.abstract: Programmable networks support a wide variety of applications, including access control, routing, monitoring, caching, and synchronization. As demand for applications grows, so does resource contention within the switch data plane. Cramming applications onto a switch is a challenging task that often results in non-modular programming, frustrating “trial and error” compile-debug cycles, and suboptimal use of resources. In this paper, we present P4All, an extension of P4 that allows programmers to define elastic data structures that stretch automatically to make optimal use of available switch resources. These data structures are defined using symbolic primitives (that parameterize the size and shape of the structure) and objective functions (that quantify the value gained or lost as that shape changes). A top-level optimization function specifies how to share resources amongst data structures or applications. We demonstrate the inherent modularity and effectiveness of our design by building a range of reusable elastic data structures including hash tables, Bloom filters, sketches, and key-value stores, and using those structures within larger applications. We show how to implement the P4All compiler using a combination of dependency analysis, loop unrolling, linear and non-linear constraint generation, and constraint solving. We evaluate the compiler’s performance, showing that a range of elastic programs can be compiled to P4 in few minutes at most, but usually less.
items.abstract_zh: 可编程网络支持多种应用，包括访问控制、路由、监控、缓存和同步。随着应用需求的增长，交换机数据平面内的资源争用也在增加。将应用程序塞到交换机上是一项具有挑战性的任务，通常会导致非模块化编程、令人沮丧的“试错”编译调试周期以及资源的次优利用。在本文中，我们提出了 P4All，它是 P4 的扩展，它允许程序员定义自动扩展的弹性数据结构，以最佳地利用可用的交换机资源。这些数据结构是使用符号基元（参数化结构的大小和形状）和目标函数（量化形状变化时获得或损失的值）来定义的。顶级优化函数指定如何在数据结构或应用程序之间共享资源。我们通过构建一系列可重用的弹性数据结构（包括哈希表、布隆过滤器、草图和键值存储）并在更大的应用程序中使用这些结构来展示我们设计的固有模块化性和有效性。我们展示了如何结合使用依赖性分析、循环展开、线性和非线性约束生成以及约束求解来实现 P4All 编译器。我们评估了编译器的性能，结果表明一系列弹性程序最多可以在几分钟内编译到 P4，但通常更短。

items.title: Characterizing Physical-Layer Transmission Errors in Cable Broadband Networks.
items.abstract: Packet loss rate in a broadband network is an important quality of service metric. Previous work that characterizes broadband performance does not separate packet loss caused by physical layer transmission errors from that caused by congestion. In this work, we investigate the physical layer transmission errors using data provided by a regional cable ISP. The data were collected from 77K+ devices that spread across 394 hybrid-fiber-coaxial (HFC) network segments during a 16-month period. We present a number of findings that are relevant to network operations and network research. We estimate that physical-layer errors can contribute to 12% to 25% of packet loss in the cable ISPs measured by the FCC’s Measuring Broadband America project. The average error loss rates of different HFC network segments vary by more than six orders of magnitude, from O (10−6%) to O (1%). Users in persistently high-error-rate networks do not report more trouble tickets than other users.
items.abstract_zh: 宽带网络中的丢包率是一个重要的服务质量指标。先前描述宽带性能的工作并未将物理层传输错误引起的数据包丢失与拥塞引起的数据包丢失区分开来。在这项工作中，我们使用区域有线 ISP 提供的数据来调查物理层传输错误。这些数据是在 16 个月内从遍布 394 个混合光纤同轴 (HFC) 网段的 77,000 多个设备收集的。我们提出了许多与网络运营和网络研究相关的发现。根据 FCC 的测量宽带美国项目的测量，我们估计物理层错误可能导致有线 ISP 中 12% 到 25% 的数据包丢失。不同HFC网段的平均错误丢失率相差六个数量级以上，从O(10−6%)到O(1%)。错误率持续较高的网络中的用户报告的故障单并不比其他用户多。

items.title: Performance Interfaces for Network Functions.
items.abstract: Modern programmers routinely use third-party code, and infrastructure operators deploy software they did not write. This would not be possible without semantic interfaces---documentation, header files, specifications---that succinctly describe what that third-party code does. We propose performance interfaces as a way to describe a system's performance, akin to how a semantic interface describes its functionality. We concretize this idea in the domain of network functions (NFs) and present a tool (PIX) that automatically extracts performance interfaces from NF implementations. We evaluate PIX on 12 NFs, including several used in production. The resulting performance interfaces are accurate yet orders of magnitude simpler than the code itself and take minutes to extract. We show how developers and operators can use performance interfaces to identify performance regressions, diagnose and fix performance bugs and identify the latency impact of NIC offloads. PIX is available at https://github.com/dslab-epfl/pix .
items.abstract_zh: 现代程序员通常使用第三方代码，而基础设施运营商部署的软件不是他们编写的。如果没有语义接口（文档、头文件、规范）来简洁地描述第三方代码的功能，这是不可能的。我们提出性能接口作为描述系统性能的一种方式，类似于语义接口描述其功能的方式。我们在网络功能（NF）领域具体化了这个想法，并提出了一个工具（PIX），可以自动从 NF 实现中提取性能接口。我们在 12 个 NF 上评估 PIX，其中包括生产中使用的几个。生成的性能接口是准确的，但比代码本身简单几个数量级，并且需要几分钟才能提取。我们展示了开发人员和运营商如何使用性能接口来识别性能回归、诊断和修复性能错误以及识别 NIC 卸载的延迟影响。 PIX 可在 https://github.com/dslab-epfl/pix 上获取。

items.title: A Case for Task Sampling based Learning for Cluster Job Scheduling.
items.abstract: The ability to accurately estimate job runtime properties allows a scheduler to effectively schedule jobs. State-of-the-art online cluster job schedulers use history-based learning, which uses past job execution information to estimate the runtime properties of newly arrived jobs. However, with fast-paced development in cluster technology (in both hardware and software) and changing user inputs, job runtime properties can change over time, which lead to inaccurate predictions. In this paper, we explore the potential and limitation of real-time learning of job runtime properties, by proactively sampling and scheduling a small fraction of the tasks of each job. Such a task-sampling-based approach exploits the similarity among runtime properties of the tasks of the same job and is inherently immune to changing job behavior. Our analytical and experimental analysis of 3 production traces with different skew and job distribution shows that learning in space can be substantially more accurate. Our simulation and testbed evaluation on Azure of the two learning approaches anchored in a generic job scheduler using 3 production cluster job traces shows that despite its online overhead, learning in space reduces the average Job Completion Time (JCT) by 1.28x, 1.56x, and 1.32x compared to the prior-art history-based predictor. Finally, we show how sampling-based learning can be extended to schedule DAG jobs and achieve similar speedups over the prior-art history-based predictor.
items.abstract_zh: 准确估计作业运行时属性的能力使调度程序能够有效地调度作业。最先进的在线集群作业调度程序使用基于历史的学习，它使用过去的作业执行信息来估计新到达作业的运行时属性。然而，随着集群技术（硬件和软件）的快速发展和用户输入的变化，作业运行时属性可能会随着时间的推移而变化，从而导致预测不准确。在本文中，我们通过主动采样和调度每个作业的一小部分任务，探索实时学习作业运行时属性的潜力和局限性。这种基于任务采样的方法利用了同一作业的任务的运行时属性之间的相似性，并且本质上不受作业行为变化的影响。我们对具有不同偏差和工作分配的 3 个生产轨迹进行分析和实验分析表明，空间学习可以更加准确。我们在 Azure 上使用 3 个生产集群作业跟踪对固定在通用作业调度程序中的两种学习方法进行模拟和测试台评估，结果表明，尽管有在线开销，但与现有技术的基于历史的预测器相比，空间学习将平均作业完成时间 (JCT) 减少了 1.28 倍、1.56 倍和 1.32 倍。最后，我们展示了如何扩展基于采样的学习来调度 DAG 作业，并实现比现有技术基于历史的预测器类似的加速。

items.title: Enabling IoT Self-Localization Using Ambient 5G Signals.
items.abstract: This paper presents ISLA , a system that enables low power IoT nodes to self-localize using ambient 5G signals without any coordination with the base stations. ISLA operates by simply overhearing transmitted 5G packets and leverages the large bandwidth used in 5G to compute high-resolution time of flight of the signals. Capturing large 5G bandwidth consumes a lot of power. To address this, ISLA leverages recent advances in MEMS acoustic resonators to design a RF filter that can stretch the effective localization bandwidth to 100 MHz while using 6.25 MHz receivers, improving ranging resolution by 16x. We implement and evaluate ISLA in three large outdoors testbeds and show high localization accuracy that is comparable with having the full 100 MHz bandwidth.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 ISLA 系统，该系统使低功耗物联网节点能够使用环境 5G 信号进行自我定位，而无需与基站进行任何协调。 ISLA 通过简单地监听传输的 5G 数据包来运行，并利用 5G 中使用的大带宽来计算信号的高分辨率飞行时间。获取大的 5G 带宽会消耗大量电量。为了解决这个问题，ISLA 利用 MEMS 声学谐振器的最新进展来设计射频滤波器，该滤波器可以在使用 6.25 MHz 接收器时将有效定位带宽扩展到 100 MHz，从而将测距分辨率提高 16 倍。我们在三个大型户外测试台中实施和评估 ISLA，并显示出与 100 MHz 完整带宽相当的高定位精度。

items.title: SCALE: Automatically Finding RFC Compliance Bugs in DNS Nameservers.
items.abstract: The Domain Name System (DNS) has intricate features that interact in subtle ways. Bugs in DNS implementations while handling combinations of these features can lead to incorrect or implementation-dependent behavior, security vulnerabilities, and more. We introduce the first approach for finding RFC compliance errors in DNS nameserver implementations via automatic test generation. Our SCALE (Small-scope Constraint-driven Automated Logical Execution) approach jointly generates zone files and corresponding queries to cover RFC behaviors specified by an executable model of DNS resolution. We have built a tool called Ferret based on this approach and applied it to test 8 open-source DNS implementations, including popular implementations such as Bind, PowerDNS, Knot, and Nsd. Ferret generated over 13K test files, of which 62% resulted in some difference among implementations. We identified and reported 30 new unique bugs from these failed test cases, including at least one bug in every implementation, of which 20 have already been fixed. Many of these existed in even the most popular DNS implementations, including a new critical vulnerability in Bind that attackers could easily exploit to crash DNS resolvers and nameservers remotely.
items.abstract_zh: 域名系统 (DNS) 具有以微妙方式相互作用的复杂功能。处理这些功能组合时 DNS 实现中的错误可能会导致不正确或依赖于实现的行为、安全漏洞等。我们介绍第一种通过自动测试生成来查找 DNS 名称服务器实现中的 RFC 合规性错误的方法。我们的 SCALE（小范围约束驱动的自动逻辑执行）方法联合生成区域文件和相应的查询，以涵盖由 DNS 解析的可执行模型指定的 RFC 行为。我们基于这种方法构建了一个名为 Ferret 的工具，并用它来测试 8 个开源 DNS 实现，包括 Bind、PowerDNS、Knot 和 Nsd 等流行的实现。 Ferret 生成了超过 13K 的测试文件，其中 62% 导致实现之间存在一些差异。我们从这些失败的测试用例中识别并报告了 30 个新的独特错误，其中每个实现中至少有一个错误，其中 20 个已得到修复。其中许多漏洞甚至存在于最流行的 DNS 实现中，包括 Bind 中的一个新的严重漏洞，攻击者可以轻松利用该漏洞远程破坏 DNS 解析器和名称服务器。

items.title: Collie: Finding Performance Anomalies in RDMA Subsystems.
items.abstract: High-speed RDMA networks are getting rapidly adopted in the industry for their low latency and reduced CPU overheads. To verify that RDMA can be used in production, system administrators need to understand the set of application workloads that can potentially trigger abnormal performance behaviors (e.g., unexpected low throughput, PFC pause frame storm). We design and implement Collie, a tool for users to systematically uncover performance anomalies in RDMA subsystems without the need to access hardware internal designs. Instead of individually testing each hardware device (e.g., NIC, memory, PCIe), Collie is holistic, constructing a comprehensive search space for application workloads. Collie then uses simulated annealing to drive RDMA-related performance and diagnostic counters to extreme value regions to find workloads that can trigger performance anomalies. We evaluate Collie on combinations of various RDMA NIC, CPU, and other hardware components. Collie found 15 new performance anomalies. All of them are acknowledged by the hardware vendors. 7 of them are already fixed after we reported them. We also present our experience in using Collie to avoid performance anomalies for an RDMA RPC library and an RDMA distributed machine learning framework.
items.abstract_zh: 高速 RDMA 网络因其低延迟和降低的 CPU 开销而在业界迅速采用。为了验证 RDMA 是否可以在生产中使用，系统管理员需要了解可能触发异常性能行为（例如意外的低吞吐量、PFC 暂停帧风暴）的一组应用程序工作负载。我们设计并实现了 Collie，这是一种工具，用户可以系统地发现 RDMA 子系统中的性能异常，而无需访问硬件内部设计。 Collie 不是单独测试每个硬件设备（例如 NIC、内存、PCIe），而是整体性的，为应用程序工作负载构建全面的搜索空间。然后，Collie 使用模拟退火将 RDMA 相关性能和诊断计数器驱动到极值区域，以查找可能触发性能异常的工作负载。我们根据各种 RDMA NIC、CPU 和其他硬件组件的组合来评估 Collie。柯利牧羊犬发现了 15 种新的表现异常现象。所有这些都得到了硬件供应商的认可。在我们报告后，其中 7 个已修复。我们还介绍了使用 Collie 避免 RDMA RPC 库和 RDMA 分布式机器学习框架性能异常的经验。

items.title: Data-Parallel Actors: A Programming Model for Scalable Query Serving Systems.
items.abstract: We present data-parallel actors (DPA) , a programming model for building distributed query serving systems. Query serving systems are an important class of applications characterized by low-latency data-parallel queries and frequent bulk data updates; they include data analytics systems like Apache Druid, full-text search engines like ElasticSearch, and time series databases like InfluxDB. They are challenging to build because they run at scale and need complex distributed functionality like data replication, fault tolerance, and update consistency. DPA makes building these systems easier by allowing developers to construct them from purely single-node components while automatically providing these critical properties. In DPA, we view a query serving system as a collection of stateful actors, each encapsulating a partition of data. DPA provides parallel operators that enable consistent, atomic, and fault-tolerant parallel updates and queries over data stored in actors. We have used DPA to build a new query serving system, a simplified data warehouse based on the single-node database MonetDB, and enhance existing ones, such as Druid, Solr, and MongoDB, adding missing user-requested features such as load balancing and elasticity. We show that DPA can distribute a system in <1K lines of code (>10× less than typical implementations in current systems) while achieving state-of-the-art performance and adding rich functionality.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了数据并行参与者（DPA），这是一种用于构建分布式查询服务系统的编程模型。查询服务系统是一类重要的应用程序，其特点是低延迟的数据并行查询和频繁的批量数据更新；它们包括 Apache Druid 等数据分析系统、ElasticSearch 等全文搜索引擎以及 InfluxDB 等时间序列数据库。它们的构建具有挑战性，因为它们大规模运行并且需要复杂的分布式功能，例如数据复制、容错和更新一致性。 DPA 允许开发人员从纯粹的单节点组件构建这些系统，同时自动提供这些关键属性，从而使构建这些系统变得更加容易。在 DPA 中，我们将查询服务系统视为有状态参与者的集合，每个参与者封装了一个数据分区。 DPA 提供并行运算符，可以对 Actor 中存储的数据进行一致、原子和容错的并行更新和查询。我们使用DPA构建了一个新的查询服务系统，一个基于单节点数据库MonetDB的简化数据仓库，并增强了现有的系统，例如Druid、Solr和MongoDB，添加了缺少的用户请求的功能，例如负载平衡和弹性。我们证明，DPA 可以用 <1K 行代码（比当前系统中的典型实现少 10 倍以上）来分发系统，同时实现最先进的性能并添加丰富的功能。

items.title: Decentralized cloud wide-area network traffic engineering with BLASTSHIELD.
items.abstract: Cloud networks are increasingly managed by centralized software defined controllers. Centralized traffic engineering controllers achieve higher network throughput than decentralized implementations, but are a single point of failure in the network. Large scale networks require controllers with isolated fault domains to contain the blast radius of faults. In this work, we present BLASTSHIELD, Microsoft’s software-defined decentralized WAN traffic engineering system. BLASTSHIELD slices the WAN into smaller fault domains, each managed by its own slice controller. Slice controllers independently engineer traffic in their slices to maximize global network throughput without relying on hierarchical or central coordination. BLASTSHIELD is fully deployed in Microsoft’s WAN and carries a majority of the backbone traffic. BLASTSHIELD achieves similar network throughput as the previous generation centralized controller and reduces traffic loss from controller failures by 60%.
items.abstract_zh: 云网络越来越多地由集中式软件定义控制器进行管理。集中式流量工程控制器比分散式实施实现了更高的网络吞吐量，但却是网络中的单点故障。大规模网络需要具有隔离故障域的控制器来遏制故障的爆炸半径。在这项工作中，我们展示了 BLASTSHIELD，微软的软件定义的去中心化 WAN 流量工程系统。 BLASTSHIELD 将 WAN 分割成更小的故障域，每个故障域都由自己的切片控制器管理。切片控制器独立地设计其切片中的流量，以最大化全局网络吞吐量，而不依赖于分层或中央协调。 BLASTSHIELD 完全部署在 Microsoft 的 WAN 中并承载大部分骨干流量。 BLASTSHIELD 实现了与上一代集中式控制器相似的网络吞吐量，并将控制器故障造成的流量损失减少了 60%。

items.title: In-Network Velocity Control of Industrial Robot Arms.
items.abstract: In-network computing has emerged as a new computational paradigm made possible with the advent of programmable data planes. The benefits of moving computations traditionally performed by servers to the network have recently been demonstrated through different applications. In this paper, we argue that programmable data planes could be a key technology enabler of cloud and edge-cloud robotics, and in general could revitalize industrial networking. We propose an in-network approach for real-time robot control that separates delay sensitive tasks from high-level control processes. The proposed system offloads real-time velocity control of robot arms to P4-enabled programmable data planes and only keeps the high-level control and planning at the industrial controller. This separation allows the deployment of industrial control in non-real-time environments like virtual machines and service containers running in a remote cloud or an edgecomputing infrastructure. In addition, we also demonstrate that our method can smoothly control 100s of robot arms with a single P4-switch, enables fast reroute between trajectories, solves the precise synchronization of multiple robots by design and supports the plug-and-play deployment of new robot devices in the industrial system, reducing both operational and management costs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着可编程数据平面的出现，网络内计算已经成为一种新的计算范式。最近通过不同的应用程序证明了将传统上由服务器执行的计算转移到网络的好处。在本文中，我们认为可编程数据平面可能是云和边缘云机器人技术的关键技术推动者，并且总体上可以振兴工业网络。我们提出了一种用于实时机器人控制的网络内方法，它将延迟敏感任务与高级控制过程分开。所提出的系统将机器人手臂的实时速度控制卸载到支持 P4 的可编程数据平面，并且仅在工业控制器上保留高级控制和规划。这种分离允许在非实时环境中部署工业控制，例如在远程云或边缘计算基础设施中运行的虚拟机和服务容器。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法可以通过单个 P4 开关平滑控制 100 个机械臂，实现轨迹之间的快速重新路由，通过设计解决多个机器人的精确同步，并支持工业系统中新机器人设备的即插即用部署，降低运营和管理成本。

items.title: CurvingLoRa to Boost LoRa Network Throughput via Concurrent Transmission.
items.abstract: LoRaWAN has emerged as an appealing technology to connect IoT devices but it functions without explicit coordination among transmitters, which can lead to many packet collisions as the network scales. State-of-the-art work proposes various approaches to deal with these collisions, but most functions only in high signal-to-interference ratio (SIR) conditions and thus does not scale to real scenarios where weak receptions are easily buried by stronger receptions from nearby transmitters. In this paper, we take a fresh look at LoRa’s physical layer, revealing that its underlying linear chirp modulation fundamentally limits the capacity and scalability of concurrentLoRa transmissions. We show that by replacing linear chirps with their non-linear counterparts, we can boost the throughput of concurrent LoRa transmissions and empower the LoRa receiver to successfully receive weak transmissions in the presence of strong colliding signals. Such a non-linear chirp design further enables the receiver to demodulate fully aligned collision symbols — a case where none of the existing approaches can deal with. We implement these ideas in a holistic LoRaWAN stack based on the USRP N210 software-defined radio platform. Our head-to-head comparison with two state-of-the-art research systems and a standard LoRaWAN base-line demonstrates that CurvingLoRa improves the network throughput by 1.6–7.6× while simultaneously sacrificing neither power efficiency nor noise resilience
items.abstract_zh: LoRaWAN 已成为连接物联网设备的一项颇具吸引力的技术，但它的运行无需发射器之间的明确协调，随着网络规模的扩大，这可能会导致许多数据包冲突。最先进的工作提出了各种方法来处理这些冲突，但大多数仅在高信号干扰比（SIR）条件下起作用，因此无法扩展到实际场景中，在这种情况下，弱接收很容易被附近发射器的较强接收所掩盖。在本文中，我们重新审视 LoRa 的物理层，揭示其底层线性调频调制从根本上限制了并发 LoRa 传输的容量和可扩展性。我们表明，通过用非线性对应物替换线性线性调频信号，我们可以提高并发 LoRa 传输的吞吐量，并使 LoRa 接收器能够在存在强冲突信号的情况下成功接收弱传输。这种非线性调频脉冲设计进一步使接收器能够解调完全对齐的冲突符号——现有方法都无法处理这种情况。我们在基于 USRP N210 软件定义无线电平台的整体 LoRaWAN 堆栈中实现了这些想法。我们与两个最先进的研究系统和标准 LoRaWAN 基线的头对头比较表明，CurvingLoRa 将网络吞吐量提高了 1.6–7.6 倍，同时既不牺牲功率效率，也不牺牲噪声恢复能力

items.title: Cetus: Releasing P4 Programmers from the Chore of Trial and Error Compiling.
items.abstract: Programmable switches are widely deployed in Alibaba's edge networks. To enable the processing of packets at line rate, our programmers use P4 language to offload network functions onto these switches. As we were developing increasingly more complex offloaded network functions, we realized that our development needs to follow a certain set of constraints in order to fit the P4 programs into available hardware resources. Not adhering to these constraints results in fitting issues, making the program uncompilable. Therefore, we decide to build a system (called Cetus) that automatically converts an uncompilable P4 program into a functionally identical but compilable P4 program. In this paper, we share our experience in the building and using of Cetus at Alibaba. Our design insights for this system come from our investigation of the past fitting issues of our production P4 programs. We found that the long dependency chains between actions in our production P4 programs are creating difficulties for the programs to comply with the hardware resources of programmable switching ASICs, resulting in the majority of our fitting issues. Guided by this finding, we designed the core approach of Cetus to efficiently synthesize a compilable program by shortening the lengthy dependency chains. We have been using Cetus in our production P4 program development for one year, and it has effectively decreased our P4 development workload by two orders of magnitude (from O (day) to O (min)). In this paper we share several real cases addressed by Cetus, along with its performance evaluation.
items.abstract_zh: 可编程交换机广泛部署在阿里巴巴的边缘网络中。为了能够以线速处理数据包，我们的程序员使用 P4 语言将网络功能卸载到这些交换机上。当我们开发越来越复杂的卸载网络功能时，我们意识到我们的开发需要遵循一组特定的约束，以便将 P4 程序适应可用的硬件资源。不遵守这些约束会导致拟合问题，从而使程序无法编译。因此，我们决定构建一个系统（称为Cetus），自动将不可编译的P4程序转换为功能相同但可编译的P4程序。在本文中，我们分享了阿里巴巴Cetus的构建和使用经验。我们对该系统的设计见解来自于我们对生产 P4 程序过去的安装问题的调查。我们发现，我们的生产 P4 程序中的操作之间的长依赖链给程序遵守可编程交换 ASIC 的硬件资源带来了困难，从而导致了我们的大多数适配问题。在这一发现的指导下，我们设计了 Cetus 的核心方法，通过缩短冗长的依赖链来有效地合成可编译的程序。我们在生产 P4 程序开发中使用 Cetus 已经一年了，它有效地将我们的 P4 开发工作量减少了两个数量级（从 O（天）到 O（分钟））。在本文中，我们分享了 Cetus 解决的几个真实案例及其性能评估。

items.title: IMap: Fast and Scalable In-Network Scanning with Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: Network scanning has been a standard measurement technique to understand a network’s security situations, e.g., revealing security vulnerabilities, monitoring service deployments. However, probing a large-scale scanning space with existing network scanners is both difficult and slow, since they are all implemented on commodity servers and deployed at the network edge. To address this, we introduce IMap, a fast and scalable in-network scanner based on programmable switches. In designing IMap, we overcome key restrictions posed by computation models and memory resources of programmable switches, and devise numerous techniques and optimizations, including an address-random and rate-adaptive probe packet generation mechanism, and a correct and efficient response packet processing scheme, to turn a switch into a practical high-speed network scanner. We implement an open-source prototype of IMap, and evaluate it with extensive testbed experiments and real-world deployments in our campus network. Evaluation results show that even with one switch port enabled, IMap can survey all ports of our campus network (i.e., a total of up to 25 billion scanning space) in 8 minutes. This demonstrates a nearly 4 times faster scanning speed and 1.5 times higher scanning accuracy than the state of the art, which shows that IMap has great potentials to be the next-generation terabit network scanner with all switch ports enabled. Leveraging IMap, we also discover several potential security threats in our campus network, and report them to our network administrators responsibly.
items.abstract_zh: 网络扫描已成为了解网络安全状况的标准测量技术，例如揭示安全漏洞、监控服务部署。然而，使用现有的网络扫描仪探测大规模扫描空间既困难又缓慢，因为它们都是在商用服务器上实现并部署在网络边缘。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 IMap，这是一种基于可编程交换机的快速且可扩展的网络内扫描器。在设计IMap时，我们克服了可编程交换机的计算模型和内存资源带来的关键限制，并设计了许多技术和优化，包括地址随机和速率自适应的探测包生成机制，以及正确有效的响应包处理方案，将交换机变成实用的高速网络扫描器。我们实现了 IMap 的开源原型，并通过广泛的测试台实验和校园网络中的实际部署对其进行了评估。评估结果表明，即使启用一个交换机端口，IMap也可以在8分钟内勘测我们校园网的所有端口（即总共高达250亿的扫描空间）。这表明，与现有技术相比，扫描速度快了近 4 倍，扫描精度提高了 1.5 倍，这表明 IMap 具有成为启用所有交换机端口的下一代太比特网络扫描器的巨大潜力。利用IMap，我们还发现了校园网络中的一些潜在安全威胁，并负责任地将其报告给我们的网络管理员。

items.title: Passive DSSS: Empowering the Downlink Communication for Backscatter Systems.
items.abstract: The uplink and downlink transmissions in most backscatter communication systems are highly asymmetric. The downlink transmission often suffers from its short range and vulnerability to interference, which limits the practical application and deployment of backscatter communication systems. In this paper, we propose passive DSSS to improve the downlink communication for practical backscatter systems. Passive DSSS is able to increase the downlink signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) by using direct sequence spread-spectrum (DSSS) techniques to suppress interference and noise. The key challenge lies in the demodulation of DSSS signals, where the conventional solutions require power-hungry computations to synchronize a locally generated spreading code with the received DSSS signal, which is infeasible on energy-constrained backscatter devices. Passive DSSS addresses such a challenge by shifting the generation and synchronization of the spreading code from the receiver to the gateway side, and therefore achieves ultra-low power DSSS demodulation. We prototype passive DSSS for proof of concept. The experimental results show that passive DSSS improves the downlink SINR by 16.5 dB, which translates to a longer effective downlink range for backscatter communication systems.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数反向散射通信系统中的上行链路和下行链路传输是高度不对称的。下行链路传输往往存在距离短、易受干扰的问题，限制了反向散射通信系统的实际应用和部署。在本文中，我们提出无源 DSSS 来改善实际反向散射系统的下行链路通信。无源DSSS能够通过使用直接序列扩频（DSSS）技术来抑制干扰和噪声，从而提高下行链路信号与干扰加噪声比（SINR）。关键挑战在于 DSSS 信号的解调，传统解决方案需要高耗电的计算才能将本地生成的扩频码与接收到的 DSSS 信号同步，这在能量受限的反向散射设备上是不可行的。无源DSSS通过将扩频码的生成和同步从接收器侧转移到网关侧来解决这一挑战，从而实现超低功耗DSSS解调。我们对被动 DSSS 进行原型设计以进行概念验证。实验结果表明，无源 DSSS 将下行链路 SINR 提高了 16.5 dB，这意味着反向散射通信系统的有效下行链路范围更长。

items.title: Efficient Scheduling Policies for Microsecond-Scale Tasks.
items.abstract: Datacenter operators today strive to support microsecond-latency applications while also using their limited CPU resources as efficiently as possible. To achieve this, several recent systems allow multiple applications to run on the same server, granting each a dedicated set of cores and reallocating cores across applications over time as load varies. Unfortunately, many of these systems do a poor job of navigating the tradeoff between latency and efficiency, sacrificing one or both, especially when handling tasks as short as 1 μ s. While the implementations of these systems (threading libraries, network stacks, etc.) have been heavily optimized, the policy choices that they make have received less scrutiny. Most systems implement a single choice of policy for allocating cores across applications and for load-balancing tasks across cores within an application. In this paper, we use simulations to compare these different policy options and explore which yield the best combination of latency and efficiency. We conclude that work stealing performs best among load-balancing policies, multiple policies can perform well for core allocations, and, surprisingly, static core allocations often outperform reallocation with small tasks. We implement the best-performing policy choices by building on Caladan, an existing core-allocating system, and demonstrate that they can yield efficiency improvements of up to 13-22% without degrading (median or tail) latency.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，数据中心运营商努力支持微秒级延迟的应用程序，同时尽可能高效地利用有限的 CPU 资源。为了实现这一目标，最近的几个系统允许多个应用程序在同一服务器上运行，为每个应用程序授予一组专用的核心，并随着负载变化而在应用程序之间重新分配核心。不幸的是，这些系统中的许多系统在处理延迟和效率之间的权衡方面做得很差，牺牲了其中一个或两者，特别是在处理短至 1 μs 的任务时。虽然这些系统（线程库、网络堆栈等）的实现已经过大量优化，但它们做出的策略选择受到的审查较少。大多数系统都实现单一策略选择，用于跨应用程序分配核心以及应用程序内跨核心的负载平衡任务。在本文中，我们使用模拟来比较这些不同的策略选项，并探索哪种策略可以产生延迟和效率的最佳组合。我们得出的结论是，工作窃取在负载平衡策略中表现最好，多个策略可以在核心分配中表现良好，并且令人惊讶的是，静态核心分配通常优于小任务的重新分配。我们通过在现有核心分配系统 Caladan 的基础上实施性能最佳的策略选择，并证明它们可以将效率提高高达 13-22%，而不会降低（中值或尾部）延迟。

items.title: Detecting Ephemeral Optical Events with OpTel.
items.abstract: Degradation or failure events in optical backbone networks affect the service level agreements for cloud services. It is critical to detect and troubleshoot these events promptly to minimize their impact. Existing telemetry systems rely on arcane tools (e.g., SNMP) and vendor-specific controllers to collect optical data, which affects both the flexibility and scale of these systems. As a result, they fail to collect the required data on time to detect and troubleshoot degradation or failure events in a timely fashion. This paper presents the design and implementation of OpTel, an optical telemetry system, that uses a centralized vendor-agnostic controller to collect optical data in a streaming fashion. More specifically, it offers flexible vendor-agnostic interfaces between the optical devices and the controller and offloads data-management tasks (e.g., creating a queryable database) from the devices to the controller. As a result, OpTel enables the collection of fine-grained optical telemetry data at the one-second granularity. It has been running in Tencent's optical backbone network for the past six months. The fine-grained data collection enables the detection of short-lived events (i.e., ephemeral events). Compared to existing telemetry systems, OpTel accurately detects 2x more optical events. It also enables troubleshooting of these optical events in a few seconds, which is orders of magnitude faster than the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 光骨干网络中的退化或故障事件会影响云服务的服务级别协议。及时检测并排除这些事件以最大程度地减少其影响至关重要。现有的遥测系统依靠神秘的工具（例如 SNMP）和供应商特定的控制器来收集光学数据，这会影响这些系统的灵活性和规模。因此，他们无法按时收集所需的数据来及时检测退化或故障事件并对其进行故障排除。本文介绍了 OpTel（一种光学遥测系统）的设计和实现，该系统使用与供应商无关的集中式控制器以流式传输方式收集光学数据。更具体地说，它在光学设备和控制器之间提供灵活的与供应商无关的接口，并将数据管理任务（例如，创建可查询的数据库）从设备卸载到控制器。因此，OpTel 能够以一秒的粒度收集细粒度的光学遥测数据。它已在腾讯的光骨干网络中运行了六个月。细粒度的数据收集能够检测短暂事件（即短暂事件）。与现有遥测系统相比，OpTel 检测光学事件的准确度高出 2 倍。它还可以在几秒钟内排除这些光学事件的故障，这比最先进的技术快了几个数量级。

items.title: Dynamic Scheduling of Approximate Telemetry Queries.
items.abstract: Network telemetry systems provide critical visibility into the state of networks. While significant progress has been made by leveraging programmable switch hardware to scale these systems to high and time-varying traffic workloads, less attention has been paid towards efficiently utilizing limited hardware resources in the face of dynamics such as the composition of traffic as well as the number and types of queries running at a given point in time. Both these dynamics have implications on resource requirements and query accuracy. In this paper, we argue that this dynamics problem motivates reframing telemetry systems as resource schedulers---a significant departure from state-of-the-art. More concretely, rather than statically partition queries across hardware and software platforms, telemetry systems ought to decide on their own and at runtime when and for how long to execute the set of active queries on the data plane. To this end, we propose an efficient approximation and scheduling algorithm that exposes accuracy and latency tradeoffs with respect to query execution to reduce hardware resource usage. We evaluate our algorithm by building DynATOS, a hardware prototype built around a reconfigurable approach to ASIC programming. We show that our approach is more robust than state-of-the-art methods to traffic dynamics and can execute dynamic workloads comprised of multiple concurrent and sequential queries of varied complexities on a single switch while meeting per-query accuracy and latency goals.
items.abstract_zh: 网络遥测系统提供对网络状态的重要可见性。虽然利用可编程交换机硬件将这些系统扩展到高且时变的流量工作负载方面已经取得了重大进展，但在面对动态（例如流量的组成以及在给定时间点运行的查询的数量和类型）时，对有效利用有限的硬件资源的关注较少。这两种动态都会对资源需求和查询准确性产生影响。在本文中，我们认为这个动态问题促使将遥测系统重新构建为资源调度程序——这与最先进的技术有很大的不同。更具体地说，遥测系统不应在硬件和软件平台上静态地划分查询，而应在运行时自行决定在数据平面上执行一组活动查询的时间和时长。为此，我们提出了一种有效的近似和调度算法，该算法公开了查询执行方面的准确性和延迟权衡，以减少硬件资源的使用。我们通过构建 DynATOS 来评估我们的算法，DynATOS 是一种围绕可重新配置的 ASIC 编程方法构建的硬件原型。我们表明，我们的方法比最先进的流量动态方法更强大，并且可以在单个交换机上执行由多个并发和顺序查询组成的不同复杂性的动态工作负载，同时满足每个查询的准确性和延迟目标。

items.title: Graham: Synchronizing Clocks by Leveraging Local Clock Properties.
