items.abstract: High performance, strongly consistent applications are beginning to require scalable sub-microsecond clock synchronization. State-of-the-art clock synchronization focuses on improving accuracy or frequency of synchronization, ignoring the properties of the local clock: lost of connectivity to the remote clock means synchronization failure. Our system, Graham, leverages the fact that the local clock still keeps time even when connectivity is lost and builds a failure model using the characteristics of the local clock and the desired synchronization accuracy. Graham characterizes the local clock using commodity sensors present in nearly every server and leverages this data to further improve clock accuracy, increasing the tolerance of Graham to failures. Graham reduces the clock drift of a commodity server by up to 2000×, reducing the maximum assumed drift in most situations from 200ppm to 100ppb.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能、高度一致的应用程序开始需要可扩展的亚微秒时钟同步。最先进的时钟同步侧重于提高同步的准确性或频率，而忽略了本地时钟的属性：失去与远程时钟的连接意味着同步失败。我们的系统 Graham 利用本地时钟即使在连接丢失时仍然保持时间的事实，并使用本地时钟的特性和所需的同步精度构建故障模型。 Graham 使用几乎每台服务器中存在的商品传感器来表征本地时钟，并利用这些数据进一步提高时钟精度，从而提高 Graham 对故障的容忍度。 Graham 将商品服务器的时钟漂移降低了 2000 倍，将大多数情况下的最大假设漂移从 200ppm 降低到 100ppb。

items.title: SketchLib: Enabling Efficient Sketch-based Monitoring on Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: Sketching algorithms or sketches enable accurate network measurement results with low resource footprints. While emerging programmable switches are an attractive target to get these benefits, current implementations of sketches are either inefficient and/or infeasible on hardware. Our contributions in the paper are: (1) systematically analyzing the resource bottlenecks of existing sketch implementations in hardware; (2) identifying practical and correct-by-construction optimization techniques to tackle the identified bottlenecks; and (3) designing an easy-to-use library called SketchLib to help developers efficiently implement their sketch algorithms in switch hardware to benefit from these resource optimizations. Our evaluation on state-of-the-art sketches demonstrates that SketchLib reduces the hardware resource footprint up to 96% without impacting fidelity.
items.abstract_zh: 绘制算法或草图可以以较低的资源占用实现准确的网络测量结果。虽然新兴的可编程交换机是获得这些好处的一个有吸引力的目标，但当前的草图实现在硬件上要么效率低下，要么不可行。我们在本文中的贡献是：（1）系统地分析了现有草图硬件实现的资源瓶颈； (2) 确定实用且通过构建纠正的优化技术来解决已确定的瓶颈； (3) 设计一个名为 SketchLib 的易于使用的库，帮助开发人员在交换机硬件中高效地实现草图算法，从而从这些资源优化中受益。我们对最先进草图的评估表明，SketchLib 将硬件资源占用量减少了 96%，且不影响保真度。

items.title: Configanator: A Data-driven Approach to Improving CDN Performance.
items.abstract: The web serving protocol stack is constantly evolving to tackle the technological shifts in networking infrastructure and website complexity. As a result of this evolution, web servers can use a plethora of protocols and configuration parameters to address a variety of realistic network conditions. Yet, today, despite the significant diversity in end-user networks and devices, most content providers have adopted a “one-size-fits-all” approach to configuring the networking stack of their user-facing web servers (or at best employ moderate tuning). In this paper, we demonstrate that the status quo results in sub-optimal performance and argue for a novel framework that extends existing CDN architectures to provide programmatic control over a web server’s configuration parameters. We designed a data-driven framework, Configanator, that leverages data across connections to identify their network and device characteristics, and learn the optimal configuration parameters to improve end-user performance. We evaluate Configanator on five traces, including one from a global content provider, and evaluate the performance improvements for real users through two live deployments. Our results show that Configanator improves tail (p95) web performance by 32-67% across diverse websites and networks.
items.abstract_zh: Web 服务协议栈不断发展，以应对网络基础设施和网站复杂性的技术转变。由于这种演变，Web 服务器可以使用大量协议和配置参数来解决各种实际的网络条件。然而，如今，尽管最终用户网络和设备存在显着差异，但大多数内容提供商都采用了“一刀切”的方法来配置其面向用户的 Web 服务器的网络堆栈（或者最多采用适度的调整）。在本文中，我们证明了现状导致性能不佳，并提出了一种新颖的框架来扩展现有的 CDN 架构，以提供对 Web 服务器配置参数的编程控制。我们设计了一个数据驱动框架 Configanator，它利用跨连接的数据来识别其网络和设备特征，并学习最佳配置参数以提高最终用户性能。我们根据五项跟踪评估 Configanator，其中一项来自全球内容提供商，并通过两次实时部署评估真实用户的性能改进。我们的结果表明，Configanator 将不同网站和网络的尾部 (p95) Web 性能提高了 32-67%。

items.title: Spectrum: High-bandwidth Anonymous Broadcast.
items.abstract: We present Spectrum, a high-bandwidth, metadata-private file broadcasting system. In Spectrum, a small number of broadcasters share a file with many subscribers via two or more non-colluding broadcast servers. Subscribers generate cover traffic by sending dummy files, hiding which users are broadcasters and which users are only consumers. Spectrum optimizes for a setting with few broadcasters and many subscribers—as is common to many real-world applications—to drastically improve throughput over prior work. Malicious clients are prevented from disrupting broadcasts using a novel blind access control technique that allows servers to reject malformed requests. Spectrum also prevents deanonymization of broadcasters by malicious servers deviating from protocol. Our techniques for providing malicious security are applicable to other systems for anonymous broadcast and may be of independent interest. We implement and evaluate Spectrum. Compared to the state-of-the-art in cryptographic anonymous communication systems, Spectrum’s peak throughput is 4–120,000× faster (and commensurately cheaper) in a broadcast setting. Deployed on two commodity servers, Spectrum allows broadcasters to share 1GB (two full-length 720p documentary movies) in 13h 20m with an anonymity set of 10,000 (for a total cost of about $6.84). These costs scale roughly linearly in the size of the file and total number of users, and Spectrum parallelizes trivially with more hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 Spectrum，一种高带宽、元数据私有文件广播系统。在 Spectrum 中，少数广播公司通过两个或多个非共谋广播服务器与许多订阅者共享文件。订阅者通过发送虚拟文件来生成覆盖流量，隐藏哪些用户是广播者，哪些用户只是消费者。 Spectrum 针对广播公司较少、订阅者较多的环境进行了优化（这对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说很常见），与之前的工作相比，大大提高了吞吐量。使用新颖的盲访问控制技术可以防止恶意客户端中断广播，该技术允许服务器拒绝格式错误的请求。 Spectrum 还可以防止违反协议的恶意服务器对广播公司进行去匿名化。我们提供恶意安全的技术适用于其他匿名广播系统，并且可能具有独立的利益。我们实施并评估 Spectrum。与最先进的加密匿名通信系统相比，Spectrum 在广播环境中的峰值吞吐量要快 4-120,000 倍（并且相应地更便宜）。 Spectrum 部署在两台商用服务器上，允许广播公司在 13 小时 20 分钟内以 10,000 名匿名用户共享 1GB（两部完整长度的 720p 纪录片）（总成本约为 6.84 美元）。这些成本与文件大小和用户总数大致呈线性关系，并且 Spectrum 可以通过更多硬件轻松实现并行化。

items.title: An edge-queued datagram service for all datacenter traffic.
items.abstract: Modern datacenters support a wide range of protocols and in-network switch enhancements aimed at improving performance. Unfortunately, most new and legacy protocols and enhancements often don’t coexist gracefully because they inevitably interact via queuing in the network. In this paper we describe EQDS, a new datagram service for datacenters that moves almost all of the queuing out of the core network and into the sending host. This enables it to support multiple (conflicting) higher layer protocols, while only sending packets into the network when decided by a receiver-driven credit scheme. EQDS can speed-up legacy TCP and RDMA stacks and enable transport protocol evolution, while benefiting from future switch enhancements without needing to modify higher layer stacks. We show through simulation and multiple implementations that EQDS can reduce FCT of legacy TCP by 2x, improve the NVMeOF throughput by 30%, and safely run TCP alongside RDMA on the same network.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心支持多种旨在提高性能的协议和网络内交换机增强功能。不幸的是，大多数新的和遗留的协议和增强功能通常不能优雅地共存，因为它们不可避免地通过网络中的排队进行交互。在本文中，我们描述了 EQDS，这是一种用于数据中心的新数据报服务，它将几乎所有队列从核心网络移至发送主机。这使其能够支持多个（冲突的）高层协议，同时仅在接收器驱动的信用方案决定时才将数据包发送到网络中。 EQDS 可以加速传统 TCP 和 RDMA 堆栈并实现传输协议演进，同时受益于未来的交换机增强功能，而无需修改更高层堆栈。我们通过仿真和多次实现表明，EQDS 可以将传统 TCP 的 FCT 降低 2 倍，将 NVMeOF 吞吐量提高 30%，并在同一网络上与 RDMA 一起安全地运行 TCP。

items.title: CloudCluster: Unearthing the Functional Structure of a Cloud Service.
items.abstract: In their quest to provide customers with good tools to manage cloud services, cloud providers are hampered by having very little visibility into cloud service functionality; a provider often only knows where VMs of a service are placed, how the virtual networks are configured, how VMs are provisioned, and how VMs communicate with each other. In this paper, we show that, using the VM-to-VM traffic matrix, we can unearth the functional structure of a cloud service and use it to aid cloud service management. Leveraging the observation that cloud services use well-known design patterns for scaling ( e.g. , replication, communication locality), we show that clustering the VM-to-VM traffic matrix yields the functional structure of the cloud service. Our clustering algorithm, CloudCluster, must overcome challenges imposed by scale (cloud services contain tens of thousands of VMs) and must be robust to orders-of-magnitude variability in traffic volume and measurement noise. To do this, CloudCluster uses a novel combination of feature scaling, dimensionality reduction, and hierarchical clustering to achieve clustering with over 92% homogeneity and completeness. We show that CloudCluster can be used to explore opportunities to reduce cost for customers, identify anomalous traffic and potential misconfigurations.
items.abstract_zh: 在寻求为客户提供管理云服务的良好工具的过程中，云提供商因对云服务功能的了解很少而受到阻碍；提供商通常只知道服务的虚拟机放置在哪里、如何配置虚拟网络、如何供应虚拟机以及虚拟机之间如何通信。在本文中，我们表明，使用虚拟机到虚拟机的流量矩阵，我们可以挖掘云服务的功能结构，并用它来帮助云服务管理。利用云服务使用众所周知的扩展设计模式（例如复制、通信局部性）的观察，我们表明对虚拟机到虚拟机流量矩阵进行集群可以产生云服务的功能结构。我们的集群算法 CloudCluster 必须克服规模带来的挑战（云服务包含数万个虚拟机），并且必须对流量和测量噪声的数量级变化具有鲁棒性。为此，CloudCluster 使用特征缩放、降维和分​​层聚类的新颖组合来实现同质性和完整性超过 92% 的聚类。我们展示了 CloudCluster 可用于探索降低客户成本、识别异常流量和潜在错误配置的机会。

items.title: Automated Verification of Network Function Binaries.
items.abstract: Formally verifying the correctness of software network functions (NFs) is necessary for network reliability, yet existing techniques require full source code and mandate the use of specific data structures. We describe an automated technique to verify NF binaries, making verification usable by network operators even on proprietary code. To solve the key challenge of bridging the abstraction levels of NF implementations and specifications without special-casing a set of data structures, we observe that data structures used by NFs can be modeled as maps, and introduce a universal type to specify both NFs and their data structures, the "ghost map". In addition, we observe that the interactions between an NF and its environment are sufficient to infer control flow and types, removing the requirement for source code. We implement our technique in Klint, a tool with which we verify, in minutes, that 7 NF binaries satisfy their specifications, without limiting developers' choices of data structures. The specifications are written in Python and use maps to model state. Klint can also verify an entire NF binary stack, all the way down to the NIC driver, using a minimal operating system. Operators can thus verify NF binaries, without source code or debug symbols, without requiring developers to use specific programming languages or data structures, and without trusting any software except Klint.
items.abstract_zh: 正式验证软件网络功能（NF）的正确性对于网络可靠性是必要的，但现有技术需要完整的源代码并强制使用特定的数据结构。我们描述了一种验证 NF 二进制文件的自动化技术，使网络运营商甚至可以在专有代码上使用验证。为了解决桥接 NF 实现和规范的抽象级别而不对一组数据结构进行特殊处理的关键挑战，我们观察到 NF 使用的数据结构可以建模为映射，并引入一种通用类型来指定 NF 及其数据结构，即“幽灵映射”。此外，我们观察到 NF 与其环境之间的交互足以推断控制流和类型，从而消除了对源代码的需求。我们在 Klint 中实现了我们的技术，使用该工具我们可以在几分钟内验证 7 个 NF 二进制文件是否满足其规范，而不会限制开发人员对数据结构的选择。这些规范是用 Python 编写的，并使用映射来建模状态。 Klint 还可以使用最小的操作系统验证整个 NF 二进制堆栈，一直到 NIC 驱动程序。因此，操作员可以验证 NF 二进制文件，无需源代码或调试符号，无需开发人员使用特定的编程语言或数据结构，并且无需信任除 Klint 之外的任何软件。

items.title: Scaling Open vSwitch with a Computational Cache.
items.abstract: Open vSwitch (OVS) is a widely used open-source virtual switch implementation. In this work, we seek to scale up OVS to support hundreds of thousands of OpenFlow rules by accelerating the core component of its data-path — the packet classification mechanism. To do so we use NuevoMatch, a recent algorithm that uses neural network inference to match packets, and promises significant scalability and performance benefits. We overcome the primary algorithmic challenge of the slow rule update rate in the vanilla NuevoMatch, speeding it up by over three orders of magnitude . This improvement enables two design options to integrate NuevoMatch with OVS: (1) using it as an extra caching layer in front of OVS's megaflow cache, and (2) using it to completely replace OVS's data-path while performing classification directly on OpenFlow rules, and obviating control-path upcalls. Our comprehensive evaluation on real-world packet traces and between 1K to 500K ClassBench rules demonstrates the geometric mean speedups of 1.9× and 12.3× for the first and second designs, respectively, for 500K rules, with the latter also supporting up to 60K OpenFlow rule updates/second, by far exceeding the original OVS.
items.abstract_zh: Open vSwitch (OVS) 是一种广泛使用的开源虚拟交换机实现。在这项工作中，我们寻求通过加速其数据路径的核心组件——数据包分类机制来扩展 OVS 以支持数十万条 OpenFlow 规则。为此，我们使用 NuevoMatch，这是一种最新的算法，它使用神经网络推理来匹配数据包，并承诺显着的可扩展性和性能优势。我们克服了普通 NuevoMatch 中规则更新速度慢的主要算法挑战，将其速度提高了三个数量级以上。这一改进支持两种设计选项将 NuevoMatch 与 OVS 集成：(1) 将其用作 OVS 兆流缓存前面的额外缓存层，(2) 使用它完全取代 OVS 的数据路径，同时直接对 OpenFlow 规则执行分类，并避免控制路径上行调用。我们对真实数据包跟踪和 1K 至 500K ClassBench 规则的综合评估表明，对于 500K 规则，第一个和第二个设计的几何平均加速分别为 1.9× 和 12.3×，后者还支持每秒高达 60K OpenFlow 规则更新，远远超过原始 OVS。

items.title: RDMA is Turing complete, we just did not know it yet!
items.abstract: It is becoming increasingly popular for distributed systems to exploit offload to reduce load on the CPU. Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) offload, in particular, has become popular. However, RDMA still requires CPU intervention for complex offloads that go beyond simple remote memory access. As such, the offload potential is limited and RDMA-based systems usually have to work around such limitations. We present RedN, a principled, practical approach to implementing complex RDMA offloads, without requiring any hardware modifications. Using self-modifying RDMA chains, we lift the existing RDMA verbs interface to a Turing complete set of programming abstractions. We explore what is possible in terms of offload complexity and performance with a commodity RDMA NIC. We show how to integrate these RDMA chains into applications, such as the Memcached key-value store, allowing us to offload complex tasks such as key lookups. RedN can reduce the latency of key-value get operations by up to 2.6× compared to state-of-the-art KV designs that use one-sided RDMA primitives (e.g., FaRM-KV), as well as traditional RPC-over-RDMA approaches. Moreover, compared to these baselines, RedN provides performance isolation and, in the presence of contention, can reduce latency by up to 35× while providing applications with failure resiliency to OS and process crashes.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式系统利用卸载来减少 CPU 负载变得越来越流行。远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 卸载尤其变得流行。然而，RDMA 仍然需要 CPU 干预来处理超出简单远程内存访问范围的复杂卸载。因此，卸载潜力是有限的，基于 RDMA 的系统通常必须解决这些限制。我们提出了 RedN，这是一种原则性的、实用的方法来实现复杂的 RDMA 卸载，无需任何硬件修改。使用自修改 RDMA 链，我们将现有的 RDMA 动词接口提升为图灵完备的编程抽象集。我们探索使用商用 RDMA NIC 在卸载复杂性和性能方面的可能性。我们展示了如何将这些 RDMA 链集成到应用程序中，例如 Memcached 键值存储，从而使我们能够卸载键查找等复杂任务。与使用单侧 RDMA 原语（例如 FaRM-KV）的最先进的 KV 设计以及传统的 RPC-over-RDMA 方法相比，RedN 可以将键值获取操作的延迟减少高达 2.6 倍。此外，与这些基准相比，RedN 提供性能隔离，并且在存在争用的情况下，可以将延迟减少高达 35 倍，同时为应用程序提供针对操作系统和进程崩溃的故障恢复能力。

items.title: Accelerating Collective Communication in Data Parallel Training across Deep Learning Frameworks.
items.abstract: This work develops new techniques within Horovod, a generic communication library supporting data parallel training across deep learning frameworks. In particular, we improve the Horovod control plane by implementing a new coordination scheme that takes advantage of the characteristics of the typical data parallel training paradigm, namely the repeated execution of collectives on the gradients of a fixed set of tensors. Using a caching strategy, we execute Horovod’s existing coordinator-worker logic only once during a typical training run, replacing it with a more efficient decentralized orchestration strategy using the cached data and a global intersection of a bitvector for the remaining training duration. Next, we introduce a feature for end users to explicitly group collective operations, enabling finer grained control over the communication buffer sizes. To evaluate our proposed strategies, we conduct experiments on a world-class supercomputer — Summit. We compare our proposals to Horovod’s original design and observe 2x performance improvement at a scale of 6000 GPUs; we also compare them against tf.distribute and torch.DDP and achieve 12% better and comparable performance, respectively, using up to 1536 GPUs; we compare our solution against BytePS in typical HPC settings and achieve about 20% better performance on a scale of 768 GPUs. Finally, we test our strategies on a scientific application (STEMDL) using up to 27,600 GPUs (the entire Summit) and show that we achieve a near-linear scaling of 0.93 with a sustained performance of 1.54 exaflops (with standard error +- 0.02) in FP16 precision.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作在 Horovod 中开发了新技术，Horovod 是一个通用通信库，支持跨深度学习框架的数据并行训练。特别是，我们通过实施一种新的协调方案来改进 Horovod 控制平面，该方案利用典型数据并行训练范例的特征，即在一组固定张量的梯度上重复执行集合。使用缓存策略，我们在典型的训练运行期间仅执行一次 Horovod 现有的协调器-工作逻辑，并在剩余的训练时间内使用缓存数据和位向量的全局交集将其替换为更高效的去中心化编排策略。接下来，我们引入一项功能，供最终用户显式地对集体操作进行分组，从而实现对通信缓冲区大小的更细粒度的控制。为了评估我们提出的策略，我们在世界一流的超级计算机 Summit 上进行了实验。我们将我们的建议与 Horovod 的原始设计进行比较，并观察到在 6000 个 GPU 的规模上性能提高了 2 倍；我们还将它们与 tf.distribute 和 torch.DDP 进行比较，并使用多达 1536 个 GPU 分别实现了 12% 的更好和可比的性能；我们将我们的解决方案与典型 HPC 设置中的 BytePS 进行比较，并在 768 个 GPU 的规模上实现约 20% 的性能提升。最后，我们使用多达 27,600 个 GPU（整个 Summit）在科学应用程序 (STEMDL) 上测试我们的策略，结果表明我们在 FP16 精度下实现了 0.93 的近线性缩放，并具有 1.54 exaflops 的持续性能（标准误差 +- 0.02）。

items.title: Backdraft: a Lossless Virtual Switch that Prevents the Slow Receiver Problem.
items.abstract: Virtual switches, used for end-host networking, drop packets when the receiving application is not fast enough to consume them. This is called the slow receiver problem, and it is important because packet loss hurts tail communication latency and wastes CPU cycles, resulting in application-level performance degradation. Further, solving this problem is challenging because application throughput is highly variable over short timescales as it depends on workload, memory contention, and OS thread scheduling. This paper presents Backdraft, a new lossless virtual switch that addresses the slow receiver problem by combining three new components: (1) Dynamic Per-Flow Queuing (DPFQ) to prevent HOL blocking and provide on-demand memory usage; (2) Doorbell queues to reduce CPU overheads; (3) A new overlay network to avoid congestion spreading. We implemented Backdraft on top of BESS and conducted experiments with real applications on a 100 Gbps cluster with both DCTCP and Homa, a state-of-the-art congestion control scheme. We show that an application with Backdraft can achieve up to 20x lower tail latency at the 99 th percentile.
items.abstract_zh: 用于终端主机网络的虚拟交换机会在接收应用程序速度不够快而无法消耗数据包时丢弃数据包。这称为慢接收器问题，这一点很重要，因为数据包丢失会损害尾部通信延迟并浪费 CPU 周期，从而导致应用程序级性能下降。此外，解决这个问题具有挑战性，因为应用程序吞吐量在短时间内变化很大，因为它取决于工作负载、内存争用和操作系统线程调度。本文介绍了 Backdraft，一种新的无损虚拟交换机，它通过组合三个新组件来解决接收速度慢的问题：(1) 动态每流队列 (DPFQ)，以防止 HOL 阻塞并提供按需内存使用； (2)门铃队列，减少CPU开销； (3)新的覆盖网络以避免拥塞扩散。我们在 BESS 之上实现了 Backdraft，并在使用 DCTCP 和 Homa（一种最先进的拥塞控制方案）的 100 Gbps 集群上进行了实际应用实验。我们证明，具有 Backdraft 的应用程序可以在第 99 个百分位数处实现高达 20 倍的尾延迟降低。

items.title: IA-CCF: Individual Accountability for Permissioned Ledgers.
items.abstract: Permissioned ledger systems allow a consortium of members that do not trust one another to execute transactions safely on a set of replicas. Such systems typically use Byzantine fault tolerance (BFT) protocols to distribute trust, which only ensures safety when fewer than 1/3 of the replicas misbehave. Providing guarantees beyond this threshold is a challenge: current systems assume that the ledger is corrupt and fail to identify misbehaving replicas or hold the members that operate them accountable—instead all members share the blame. We describe IA-CCF, a new permissioned ledger system that provides individual accountability . It can assign blame to the individual members that operate misbehaving replicas regardless of the number of misbehaving replicas or members. IA-CCF achieves this by signing and logging BFT protocol messages in the ledger, and by using Merkle trees to provide clients with succinct, universally-verifiable receipts as evidence of successful transaction execution. Anyone can audit the ledger against a set of receipts to discover inconsistencies and identify replicas that signed contradictory statements. IA-CCF also supports changes to consortium membership and replicas by tracking signing keys using a sub-ledger of governance transactions. IA-CCF provides strong disincentives to misbehavior with low overhead: it executes 47,000 tx/s while providing clients with receipts in two network round trips.
items.abstract_zh: 许可账本系统允许互不信任的成员联盟在一组副本上安全地执行交易。此类系统通常使用拜占庭容错 (BFT) 协议来分配信任，只有在少于 1/3 的副本行为不当时才能确保安全。提供超出此阈值的保证是一项挑战：当前系统假设分类账已损坏，无法识别行为不当的副本或追究操作副本的成员的责任，而是所有成员都承担责任。我们描述了 IA-CCF，这是一种提供个人问责制的新许可账本系统。它可以将责任归咎于操作行为不当副本的各个成员，无论行为不当的副本或成员的数量如何。 IA-CCF 通过在账本中签名和记录 BFT 协议消息，并使用 Merkle 树为客户提供简洁、普遍可验证的收据作为交易成功执行的证据来实现这一目标。任何人都可以根据一组收据审核分类账，以发现不一致之处并识别签署矛盾声明的副本。 IA-CCF 还通过使用治理交易的子分类账跟踪签名密钥来支持对联盟成员资格和副本的更改。 IA-CCF 以较低的开销提供了对不当行为的强有力的抑制措施：它每秒执行 47,000 笔交易，同时在两次网络往返中为客户提供收据。

items.title: Optimizing Network Provisioning through Cooperation.
items.abstract: The rise of cloud-scale services has fueled a huge growth in inter-data center (DC) Wide-Area Network (WAN) traffic. As a result, cloud providers provision large amounts of WAN bandwidth at very high costs. However, the inter-DC traffic is often dominated by first-party applications , i.e., applications that are owned and operated by the same entity as the cloud provider. This creates a unique opportunity for the applications and the network to cooperate to optimize the provisioning plane, (which we term as optimizing the “provisioning plane” ), since the demands placed by dominant first-party applications often define the network. Such optimization is distinct from and goes beyond past work focused on the control and data planes (e.g., traffic engineering), in that it helps optimize the provisioning of network capacity and consequently helps reduce cost. In this paper, we show how cooperation between application and network can optimize network capacity based on knowledge of the application’s deadline coupled with network link failure statistics. Using data from a tier-1 cloud provider and a large enterprise collaboration service, we show that our techniques can potentially help provision significantly lower network capacity, with savings ranging from 30% to 45%.
items.abstract_zh: 云规模服务的兴起推动了数据中心间 (DC) 广域网 (WAN) 流量的巨大增长。因此，云提供商以非常高的成本提供大量 WAN 带宽。然而，数据中心间的流量通常由第一方应用程序主导，即由与云提供商相同的实体拥有和运营的应用程序。这为应用程序和网络合作优化配置平面（我们称之为优化“配置平面”）创造了独特的机会，因为主导的第一方应用程序提出的需求通常定义网络。这种优化不同于并超越了过去专注于控制和数据平面（例如流量工程）的工作，因为它有助于优化网络容量的配置，从而有助于降低成本。在本文中，我们展示了应用程序和网络之间的合作如何基于应用程序截止日期的知识以及网络链路故障统计来优化网络容量。使用来自一级云提供商和大型企业协作服务的数据，我们表明我们的技术可以帮助配置显着降低的网络容量，节省 30% 到 45% 不等。

items.title: FlexTOE: Flexible TCP Offload with Fine-Grained Parallelism.
items.abstract: FlexTOE is a flexible, yet high-performance TCP offload engine (TOE) to SmartNICs. FlexTOE eliminates almost all host data-path TCP processing and is fully customizable. FlexTOE interoperates well with other TCP stacks, is robust under adverse network conditions, and supports POSIX sockets. FlexTOE focuses on data-path offload of established connections, avoiding complex control logic and packet buffering in the NIC. FlexTOE leverages fine-grained parallelization of the TCP data-path and segment reordering for high performance on wimpy SmartNIC architectures, while remaining flexible via a modular design. We compare FlexTOE on an Agilio-CX40 to host TCP stacks Linux and TAS, and to the Chelsio Terminator TOE. We find that Memcached scales up to 38% better on FlexTOE versus TAS, while saving up to 81% host CPU cycles versus Chelsio. FlexTOE provides competitive performance for RPCs, even with wimpy SmartNICs. FlexTOE cuts 99.99th-percentile RPC RTT by 3.2× and 50% versus Chelsio and TAS, respectively. FlexTOE's data-path parallelism generalizes across hardware architectures, improving single connection RPC throughput up to 2.4× on x86 and 4× on BlueField. FlexTOE supports C and XDP programs written in eBPF. It allows us to implement popular data center transport features, such as TCP tracing, packet filtering and capture, VLAN stripping, flow classification, firewalling, and connection splicing.
items.abstract_zh: FlexTOE 是一种灵活且高性能的 SmartNIC TCP 卸载引擎 (TOE)。 FlexTOE 消除了几乎所有主机数据路径 TCP 处理，并且完全可定制。 FlexTOE 与其他 TCP 堆栈具有良好的互操作性，在不利的网络条件下也具有鲁棒性，并且支持 POSIX 套接字。 FlexTOE 专注于已建立连接的数据路径卸载，避免 NIC 中的复杂控制逻辑和数据包缓冲。 FlexTOE 利用 TCP 数据路径的细粒度并行化和段重新排序，在微弱的 SmartNIC 架构上实现高性能，同时通过模块化设计保持灵活性。我们将 Agilio-CX40 上的 FlexTOE 与主机 TCP 堆栈 Linux 和 TAS 以及 Chelsio Terminator TOE 进行比较。我们发现，与 TAS 相比，Memcached 在 FlexTOE 上的扩展能力提高了 38%，同时与 Chelsio 相比节省了高达 81% 的主机 CPU 周期。 FlexTOE 为 RPC 提供了具有竞争力的性能，即使智能网卡性能较差。与 Chelsio 和 TAS 相比，FlexTOE 将 99.99% 的 RPC RTT 分别降低了 3.2 倍和 50%。 FlexTOE 的数据路径并行性遍及硬件架构，将 x86 上的单连接 RPC 吞吐量提高至 2.4 倍，在 BlueField 上提高至 4 倍。 FlexTOE 支持用 eBPF 编写的 C 和 XDP 程序。它使我们能够实现流行的数据中心传输功能，例如 TCP 跟踪、数据包过滤和捕获、VLAN 剥离、流分类、防火墙和连接拼接。

items.title: Re-architecting Traffic Analysis with Neural Network Interface Cards.
items.abstract: We present an approach to improve the scalability of online machine learning-based network traffic analysis. We first make the case to replace widely-used supervised machine learning models for network traffic analysis with binary neural networks . We then introduce Neural Networks on the NIC (N3IC), a system that compiles binary neural network models into implementations that can be directly integrated in the data plane of SmartNICs. N3IC supports different hardware targets, and it generates data plane descriptions using both micro-C and P4 languages. We implement and evaluate our solution using two use cases related to traffic identification and to anomaly detection. In both cases, N3IC provides up to a 100x lower classification latency, and 1.5–7x higher throughput than state-of-the-art software-based machine learning classification systems. This is achieved by running the entire traffic analysis pipeline within the data plane of the SmartNIC, thereby completely freeing the system's CPU from any related tasks, while forwarding traffic at line rate (40Gbps) on the target NICs. Encouraged by these results we finally present the design and FPGA-based prototype of a hardware primitive that adds binary neural network support to a NIC data plane. Our new primitive requires less than 1–2% of the logic and memory resources of a VirteX7 FPGA. We show through experimental evaluation that extending the NIC data plane enables more challenging use cases that require online traffic analysis to be performed in a few microseconds.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种提高基于在线机器学习的网络流量分析的可扩展性的方法。我们首先提出用二元神经网络取代广泛使用的用于网络流量分析的监督机器学习模型的案例。然后，我们介绍 NIC 上的神经网络 (N3IC)，该系统将二进制神经网络模型编译为可直接集成到 SmartNIC 数据平面中的实现。 N3IC 支持不同的硬件目标，并使用 micro-C 和 P4 语言生成数据平面描述。我们使用与流量识别和异常检测相关的两个用例来实施和评估我们的解决方案。在这两种情况下，与最先进的基于软件的机器学习分类系统相比，N3IC 的分类延迟降低了 100 倍，吞吐量提高了 1.5 至 7 倍。这是通过在 SmartNIC 的数据平面内运行整个流量分析管道来实现的，从而将系统的 CPU 完全从任何相关任务中解放出来，同时在目标 NIC 上以线速 (40Gbps) 转发流量。受到这些结果的鼓舞，我们最终提出了硬件原语的设计和基于 FPGA 的原型，该硬件原语为 NIC 数据平面添加了二进制神经网络支持。我们的新原语需要的逻辑和内存资源不到 VirteX7 FPGA 的 1-2%。我们通过实验评估表明，扩展 NIC 数据平面可以实现更具挑战性的用例，需要在几微秒内执行在线流量分析。

items.title: RDC: Energy-Efficient Data Center Network Congestion Relief with Topological Reconfigurability at the Edge.
items.abstract: The rackless data center (RDC) is a novel network architecture that logically removes the rack boundary of traditional data centers and the inefficiencies that come with it. As modern applications generate more and more inter-rack traffic, the traditional architecture suffers from contention at the core, imbalanced bandwidth utilization across racks, and longer network paths. RDC addresses these limitations by enabling servers to logically move across the rack boundary at runtime. Our design achieves this by inserting circuit switches at the network edge between the ToR switches and the servers, and by reconfiguring the circuits to regroup servers across racks based on the traffic patterns. We have performed extensive evaluations of RDC both in a hardware testbed and packet-level simulations and show that RDC can speed up a 4:1 oversubscribed network by 1.78× ∼ 3.9× for realistic applications and more than 10× in large-scale simulation; furthermore, RDC is up to 2.4× better in performance per watt than a conventional non-blocking network.
items.abstract_zh: 无机架数据中心（RDC）是一种新颖的网络架构，从逻辑上消除了传统数据中心的机架边界以及随之而来的低效率。随着现代应用程序产生越来越多的机架间流量，传统架构面临核心争用、机架间带宽利用率不平衡以及网络路径更长的问题。 RDC 通过使服务器能够在运行时逻辑地跨机架边界移动来解决这些限制。我们的设计通过在 ToR 交换机和服务器之间的网络边缘插入电路交换机，并根据流量模式重新配置电路以跨机架重新分组服务器来实现这一目标。我们在硬件测试台和数据包级模拟中对 RDC 进行了广泛的评估，结果表明，在实际应用中，RDC 可以将 4:1 超额订阅网络加速 1.78× ∼ 3.9×，在大规模模拟中加速超过 10 倍；此外，RDC 的每瓦性能比传统的非阻塞网络高出 2.4 倍。

items.title: Elixir: A High-performance and Low-cost Approach to Managing Hardware/Software Hybrid Flow Tables Considering Flow Burstiness.
items.abstract: Hardware/software hybrid flow table is common in modern commodity network devices, such as NFV servers, smart NICs and SDN/OVS switches. The overall forwarding performance of the network device and the required CPU resources are considerably affected by the method of how to split the flow table between hardware and software. Previous works usually leverage the traffic skewness for flow table splitting, e.g. offloading top 10% largest flows to the hardware can save up to ~90% CPU resources. However, the widely-existing bursty flows bring more challenges to flow table splitting. In particular, we need to identify the proper flows and proper timing to exchange the flows between hardware and software by considering flow burstiness, so as to maximize the overall performance with low overhead. In this paper we present Elixir, a high-performance and low-cost approach to managing hardware/software hybrid flow tables on commodity devices. The core idea of Elixir includes three parts, namely, combining sampling-based and counter-based mechanisms for flow rate measurement, separating the replacement of large flows and bursty flows, as well as decoupling the flow rate identification window and the flow replacement window. We have implemented Elixir prototypes on both Mellanox ConnectX-5 NIC and Barefoot Wedge100BF-32X/65X P4 Switch, with a software library on top of DPDK. Our experiments based on real-world data traces demonstrate that, compared with the state-of-the-art solutions, Elixir can save up to ~50% software CPU resources while keeping the tail forwarding latency ~97.6% lower.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件/软件混合流表在现代商用网络设备中很常见，例如 NFV 服务器、智能 NIC 和 SDN/OVS 交换机。流表在硬件和软件之间的分割方式对网络设备的整体转发性能和所需的CPU资源有很大的影响。以前的工作通常利用流量偏度来进行流表分割，例如将前 10% 的最大流量卸载到硬件可以节省高达约 90% 的 CPU 资源。然而，广泛存在的突发流给流表分裂带来了更多的挑战。特别是，我们需要考虑流量突发性来确定硬件和软件之间交换流量的适当流量和适当时机，从而以较低的开销最大化整体性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 Elixir，一种高性能且低成本的方法，用于管理商用设备上的硬件/软件混合流表。 Elixir的核心思想包括三个部分，即基于采样和基于计数器的流量测量机制相结合、大流和突发流的替换分离、以及流量识别窗口和流替换窗口的解耦。我们在 Mellanox ConnectX-5 NIC 和 Barefoot Wedge100BF-32X/65X P4 交换机上实现了 Elixir 原型，并在 DPDK 之上提供了软件库。我们基于真实世界数据跟踪的实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Elixir 可以节省高达约 50% 的软件 CPU 资源，同时将尾部转发延迟降低约 97.6%。

items.title: Closed-loop Network Performance Monitoring and Diagnosis with SpiderMon.
items.abstract: Performance monitoring and diagnosis are essential for data centers. The emergence of programmable switches has led to the development of a slew of monitoring systems, but most of them do not explicitly target posterior diagnosis. On one hand, “query-driven” monitoring systems must be pre-configured with a static query, but it is difficult to achieve high coverage because the right query for posterior diagnosis may not be known in advance. On the other hand, “blanket” monitoring systems have high coverage as they always collect telemetry data from all switches, but they collect excessive data. SpiderMon is a system that co-designs monitoring and posterior diagnosis in a closed loop to achieve low overhead and high coverage simultaneously, by leveraging “wait-for” relations to guide its operations. We evaluate SpiderMon in both Tofino hardware and BMv2 software switches and show that SpiderMon diagnoses performance problems accurately and quickly with low overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 性能监控和诊断对于数据中心至关重要。可编程开关的出现导致了一系列监测系统的发展，但其中大多数并没有明确针对事后诊断。一方面，“查询驱动”的监控系统必须预先配置静态查询，但很难实现高覆盖率，因为事后诊断的正确查询可能无法提前知道。另一方面，“全面”监控系统覆盖率高，因为它们总是从所有交换机收集遥测数据，但它们收集的数据过多。 SpiderMon是一个在闭环中共同设计监控和事后诊断的系统，通过利用“等待”关系来指导其操作，同时实现低开销和高覆盖率。我们在 Tofino 硬件和 BMv2 软件交换机中评估 SpiderMon，结果表明 SpiderMon 能够以较低的开销准确、快速地诊断性能问题。

items.title: Isolation Mechanisms for High-Speed Packet-Processing Pipelines.
items.abstract: Data-plane programmability is now mainstream. As we find more use cases, deployments need to be able to run multiple packet-processing modules in a single device. These are likely to be developed by independent teams, either within the same organization or from multiple organizations. Therefore, we need isolation mechanisms to ensure that modules on the same device do not interfere with each other. This paper presents Menshen, an extension of the Reconfigurable Match Tables (RMT) pipeline that enforces isolation between different packet-processing modules. Menshen is comprised of a set of lightweight hardware primitives and an extension to the open source P4-16 reference compiler that act in conjunction to meet this goal. We have prototyped Menshen on two FPGA platforms (NetFPGA and Corundum). We show that our design provides isolation, and allows new modules to be loaded without impacting the ones already running. Finally, we demonstrate the feasibility of implementing Menshen on ASICs by using the FreePDK45nm technology library and the Synopsys DC synthesis software, showing that our design meets timing at a 1 GHz clock frequency and needs approximately 6% additional chip area. We have open sourced the code for Menshen’s hardware and software at https://isolation.quest/ .
items.abstract_zh: 数据平面可编程性现已成为主流。随着我们发现更多用例，部署需要能够在单个设备中运行多个数据包处理模块。这些可能是由同一组织内或来自多个组织的独立团队开发的。因此，我们需要隔离机制来保证同一设备上的模块不会互相干扰。本文介绍了 Menshen，它是可重新配置匹配表 (RMT) 管道的扩展，可强制不同数据包处理模块之间的隔离。 Menshen 由一组轻量级硬件原语和开源 P4-16 参考编译器的扩展组成，它们共同作用来实现这一目标。我们在两个 FPGA 平台（NetFPGA 和 Corundum）上制作了 Menshen 原型。我们表明我们的设计提供了隔离，并允许加载新模块而不影响已经运行的模块。最后，我们展示了使用 FreePDK45nm 技术库和 Synopsys DC 综合软件在 ASIC 上实现 Menshen 的可行性，表明我们的设计满足 1 GHz 时钟频率的时序，并且需要大约 6% 的额外芯片面积。我们在 https://isolation.quest/ 开源了 Menshen 的硬件和软件代码。

items.title: MLaaS in the Wild: Workload Analysis and Scheduling in Large-Scale Heterogeneous GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: With the sustained technological advances in machine learning (ML) and the availability of massive datasets recently, tech companies are deploying large ML-as-a-Service (MLaaS) clouds, often with heterogeneous GPUs, to provision a host of ML applications. However, running diverse ML workloads in heterogeneous GPU clusters raises a number of challenges. In this paper, we present a characterization study of a two-month workload trace collected from a production MLaaS cluster with over 6,000 GPUs in Alibaba. We explain the challenges posed to cluster scheduling, including the low GPU utilization, the long queueing delays, the presence of hard-to-schedule tasks demanding high-end GPUs with picky scheduling requirements, the imbalance load across heterogeneous machines, and the potential bottleneck on CPUs. We describe our current solutions and call for further investigations into the challenges that remain open to address. We have released the trace for public access, which is the most comprehensive in terms of the workloads and cluster scale.
items.abstract_zh: 随着最近机器学习 (ML) 技术的持续进步和海量数据集的可用性，科技公司正在部署大型机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 云（通常使用异构 GPU）来提供大量机器学习应用程序。然而，在异构 GPU 集群中运行不同的 ML 工作负载会带来许多挑战。在本文中，我们对从阿里巴巴拥有 6,000 多个 GPU 的生产 MLaaS 集群收集的两个月工作负载跟踪进行了表征研究。我们解释了集群调度面临的挑战，包括GPU利用率低、排队延迟长、难以调度的任务需要高端GPU且调度要求挑剔、异构机器之间的负载不平衡以及CPU的潜在瓶颈。我们描述了我们当前的解决方案，并呼吁对仍然有待解决的挑战进行进一步调查。我们已经发布了公共访问的跟踪，它在工作负载和集群规模方面是最全面的。

items.title: Runtime Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: Programming the network to add, remove, and modify functions has been a longstanding goal in our community. Unfortunately, in today’s programmable networks, the velocity of change is restricted by a practical yet fundamental barrier: reprogramming network devices is an intrusive change, requiring management operations such as draining and rerouting traffic from the target node, re-imaging the data plane, and redirecting traffic back to its original route. This project investigates design techniques to make future networks runtime programmable. FlexCore enables partial reconfiguration of switch data planes at runtime with minimum resource overheads, without service disruption, while processing packets with consistency guarantees. It involves design considerations in switch architectures, partial reconfiguration primitives, reconfiguration algorithms, as well as consistency guarantees. Our evaluation results demonstrate the feasibility and benefits of runtime programmable switches.
items.abstract_zh: 对网络进行编程以添加、删除和修改功能一直是我们社区的长期目标。不幸的是，在当今的可编程网络中，变化的速度受到实际但基本的障碍的限制：重新编程网络设备是一种侵入性变化，需要管理操作，例如从目标节点排出和重新路由流量、重新镜像数据平面以及将流量重定向回其原始路由。该项目研究了使未来网络运行时可编程的设计技术。 FlexCore 能够在运行时以最小的资源开销对交换机数据平面进行部分重新配置，而不会中断服务，同时处理具有一致性保证的数据包。它涉及交换机架构、部分重配置原语、重配置算法以及一致性保证的设计考虑。我们的评估结果证明了运行时可编程开关的可行性和优势。

items.title: SwarmMap: Scaling Up Real-time Collaborative Visual SLAM at the Edge.
items.abstract: The Edge-based Multi-agent visual SLAM plays a key role in emerging mobile applications such as search-and-rescue, inventory automation, and drone grouping. This algorithm relies on a central node to maintain the global map and schedule agents to execute their individual tasks. However, as the number of agents continues growing, the operational overhead of the visual SLAM system such as data redundancy, bandwidth consumption, and localization errors also scale, which challenges the system scalability. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of SwarmMap, a framework design that scales up collaborative visual SLAM service in edge offloading settings. At the core of SwarmMap are three simple yet effective system modules — a change log-based server-client synchronization mechanism, a priority-aware task scheduler, and a lean representation of the global map that work hand-in-hand to address the data explosion caused by the growing number of agents. We make SwarmMap compatible with the robotic operating system (ROS) and open-source it. Existing visual SLAM applications could incorporate SwarmMap to enhance their performance and capacity in multi-agent scenarios. Comprehensive evaluations and a three-month case study at one of the world's largest oil fields demonstrate that SwarmMap can serve 2× more agents (>20 agents) than the state of the arts with the same resource overhead, meanwhile maintaining an average trajectory error of 38 cm , outperforming existing works by > 55%.
items.abstract_zh: 基于边缘的多智能体视觉 SLAM 在搜索救援、库存自动化和无人机分组等新兴移动应用中发挥着关键作用。该算法依靠中央节点来维护全局地图并调度代理来执行各自的任务。然而，随着智能体数量的不断增长，视觉SLAM系统的数据冗余、带宽消耗和定位错误等运行开销也会随之增加，这对系统的可扩展性提出了挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 SwarmMap 的设计和实现，这是一种在边缘卸载设置中扩展协作视觉 SLAM 服务的框架设计。 SwarmMap 的核心是三个简单而有效的系统模块——基于变更日志的服务器-客户端同步机制、优先级感知任务调度程序以及全局地图的精益表示，它们携手合作，解决因代理数量不断增长而导致的数据爆炸问题。我们使 SwarmMap 与机器人操作系统（ROS）兼容并开源。现有的视觉 SLAM 应用程序可以合并 SwarmMap，以增强其在多智能体场景中的性能和容量。对世界上最大的油田之一进行的综合评估和为期三个月的案例研究表明，在相同的资源开销下，SwarmMap 可以比现有技术多服务 2 倍的智能体（>20 个智能体），同时保持 38 厘米的平均轨迹误差，比现有工作高出 55% 以上。

items.title: Exploiting Digital Micro-Mirror Devices for Ambient Light Communication.
items.abstract: There is a growing interest in exploiting ambient light for wireless communication. This new research area has two key advantages: it utilizes a free portion of the spectrum and does not require modifications of the lighting infrastructure. Most existing designs, however, rely on a single type of optical surface at the transmitter: liquid crystal displays (LCDs). LCDs have two inherent limitations, they cut the optical power in half, which affects the range; and they have slow time responses, which affects the data rate. We take a step back to provide a new perspective for ambient light communication with two novel contributions. First, we propose an optical model to understand the fundamental limits and opportunities of ambient light communication. Second, based on the insights of our model, we build a novel platform, dubbedPhotoLink, that exploits a different type of optical surface: digital micro-mirror devices (DMDs). Considering the same scenario in terms of surface area and ambient light conditions, we benchmark the performance of PhotoLink using two types of receivers, one optimized for LCDs and the other for DMDs. In both cases, PhotoLink outperforms the data rate of equivalent LCD-transmitters by factors of 30 and 80: 30kbps & 80 kbps vs. 1 kbps, while consuming less than 50 mW. Even when compared to a more sophisticated multi-cell LCD platform, which has a surface area that is 500 times bigger than ours, PhotoLink’s data rate is 10-fold: 80 kbps vs. 8 kbps. To the best of our knowledge this is the first work providing an optical model for ambient light communication and breaking the 10 kbps barrier for these types of links.
items.abstract_zh: 人们对利用环境光进行无线通信越来越感兴趣。这个新的研究领域有两个关键优势：它利用光谱的免费部分，并且不需要修改照明基础设施。然而，大多数现有设计都依赖于发射器上的单一类型光学表面：液晶显示器 (LCD)。 LCD 有两个固有的限制，它们将光功率减半，这会影响范围；它们的时间响应速度较慢，这会影响数据速率。我们退后一步，通过两项新颖的贡献为环境光通信提供了新的视角。首先，我们提出了一个光学模型来了解环境光通信的基本限制和机会。其次，根据我们模型的见解，我们构建了一个名为 PhotoLink 的新颖平台，它利用了不同类型的光学表面：数字微镜器件 (DMD)。考虑到表面积和环境光条件方面的相同场景，我们使用两种类型的接收器对 PhotoLink 的性能进行基准测试，一种针对 LCD 进行优化，另一种针对 DMD 进行优化。在这两种情况下，PhotoLink 的数据速率均优于同等 LCD 发射器 30 倍和 80 倍：30kbps 和 80 kbps 与 1 kbps，而功耗不到 50 mW。即使与表面积比我们大 500 倍的更复杂的多单元 LCD 平台相比，PhotoLink 的数据速率也是其 10 倍：80 kbps 与 8 kbps。据我们所知，这是第一项为环境光通信提供光学模型并突破此类链路 10 kbps 障碍的工作。

items.title: DispersedLedger: High-Throughput Byzantine Consensus on Variable Bandwidth Networks.
items.abstract: The success of blockchains has sparked interest in large-scale deployments of Byzantine fault tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols over wide area networks. A central feature of such networks is variable communication bandwidth across nodes and across time. We present DispersedLedger, an asynchronous BFT protocol that provides near-optimal throughput in the presence of such variable network bandwidth. The core idea of DispersedLedger is to enable nodes to propose, order, and agree on blocks of transactions without having to download their full content. By enabling nodes to agree on an ordered log of blocks, with a guarantee that each block is available within the network and unmalleable, DispersedLedger decouples bandwidth-intensive block downloads at different nodes, allowing each to make progress at its own pace. We build a full system prototype and evaluate it on real-world and emulated networks. Our results on a geo-distributed wide-area deployment across the Internet shows that DispersedLedger achieves 2x better throughput and 74% reduction in latency compared to HoneyBadger, the state-of-the-art asynchronous protocol.
items.abstract_zh: 区块链的成功引发了人们对在广域网上大规模部署拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议的兴趣。此类网络的一个核心特征是跨节点和跨时间的可变通信带宽。我们提出了 DispersedLedger，这是一种异步 BFT 协议，可在存在此类可变网络带宽的情况下提供接近最佳的吞吐量。 DispersedLedger 的核心思想是使节点能够提议、订购和商定交易块，而无需下载其完整内容。通过使节点能够就区块的有序日志达成一致，并保证每个区块在网络中可用且不可延展，DispersedLedger 解耦了不同节点上的带宽密集型区块下载，允许每个区块按照自己的节奏取得进展。我们构建了一个完整的系统原型，并在现实世界和模拟网络上对其进行评估。我们对跨互联网的地理分布式广域部署的结果表明，与最先进的异步协议 HoneyBadger 相比，DispersedLedger 的吞吐量提高了 2 倍，延迟降低了 74%。

items.title: C2DN: How to Harness Erasure Codes at the Edge for Efficient Content Delivery.
items.abstract: Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) deliver much of the world’s web and video content to users from thousands of clusters deployed at the “edges” of the Internet. Maintaining consistent performance in this large distributed system is challenging. Through analysis of month-long logs from over 2000 clusters of a large CDN, we study the patterns of server unavailability. For a CDN with no redundancy, each server unavailability causes a sudden loss in performance as the objects previously cached on that server are not accessible, which leads to a miss ratio spike. The state-of-the-art mitigation technique used by large CDNs is to replicate objects across multiple servers within a cluster. We find that although replication reduces miss ratio spikes, spikes remain a performance challenge. We present C2DN, the first CDN design that achieves a lower miss ratio, higher availability, higher resource efficiency, and close-to-perfect write load balancing. The core of our design is to introduce erasure coding into the CDN architecture and use the parity chunks to re-balance the write load across servers. We implement C2DN on top of open-source production software and demonstrate that compared to replication-based CDNs, C2DN obtains 11% lower byte miss ratio, eliminates unavailability-induced miss ratio spikes, and reduces write load imbalance by 99%.
items.abstract_zh: 内容交付网络 (CDN) 通过部署在互联网“边缘”的数千个集群向用户交付全球大部分网络和视频内容。在这个大型分布式系统中保持一致的性能具有挑战性。通过分析大型 CDN 的 2000 多个集群长达一个月的日志，我们研究了服务器不可用的模式。对于没有冗余的 CDN，每台服务器不可用都会导致性能突然下降，因为之前缓存在该服务器上的对象无法访问，从而导致未命中率峰值。大型 CDN 使用的最先进的缓解技术是在集群内的多个服务器之间复制对象。我们发现，尽管复制减少了未命中率峰值，但峰值仍然是性能挑战。我们推出了 C2DN，这是第一个实现更低的丢失率、更高的可用性、更高的资源效率和近乎完美的写入负载平衡的 CDN 设计。我们设计的核心是将纠删码引入CDN架构中，并使用奇偶校验块来重新平衡服务器之间的写入负载。我们在开源生产软件之上实现了 C2DN，并证明与基于复制的 CDN 相比，C2DN 的字节丢失率降低了 11%，消除了不可用性引起的丢失率峰值，并将写入负载不平衡减少了 99%。

items.title: OrbWeaver: Using IDLE Cycles in Programmable Networks for Opportunistic Coordination.
items.abstract: Network operators are frequently presented with a tradeoff: either (a) introduce a control-/management-plane application that may improve overall performance, or (b) use the bandwidth it would have occupied to deliver user traffic. In this paper, we present OrbWeaver, a framework that can exploit unused network bandwidth for in-network coordination. Using real hardware, we demonstrate that OrbWeaver can harvest this bandwidth (1) with little-to-no impact on the bandwidth/latency of user packets and (2) while providing guarantees on the interarrival time of the injected traffic. Through an exploration of three example use cases, we show that this opportunistic coordination abstraction is sufficient to approximate recently proposed systems without any of their associated bandwidth overheads.
items.abstract_zh: 网络运营商经常面临权衡：要么（a）引入可以提高整体性能的控制/管理平面应用程序，要么（b）使用它本来占用的带宽来传输用户流量。在本文中，我们提出了 OrbWeaver，一个可以利用未使用的网络带宽进行网络内协调的框架。使用真实硬件，我们证明 OrbWeaver 可以获取此带宽 (1) 对用户数据包的带宽/延迟几乎没有影响，(2) 同时保证注入流量的到达间隔时间。通过对三个示例用例的探索，我们表明这种机会协调抽象足以近似最近提出的系统，而无需任何相关的带宽开销。

items.title: Unlocking the Power of Inline Floating-Point Operations on Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: The advent of switches with programmable dataplanes has enabled the rapid development of new network functionality, as well as providing a platform for acceleration of a broad range of application-level functionality. However, existing switch hardware was not designed with application acceleration in mind, and thus applications requiring operations or datatypes not used in traditional network protocols must resort to expensive workarounds. Applications involving floating point data, including distributed training for machine learning and distributed query processing, are key examples. In this paper, we propose FPISA, a floating point representation designed to work efficiently in programmable switches. We first implement FPISA on an Intel Tofino switch, but find that it has limitations that impact throughput and accuracy. We then propose hardware changes to address these limitations based on the open-source Banzai switch architecture, and synthesize them in a 15-nm standard-cell library to demonstrate their feasibility. Finally, we use FPISA to implement accelerators for training for machine learning and for query processing, and evaluate their performance on a switch implementing our changes using emulation. We find that FPISA allows distributed training to use 25-75% fewer CPU cores and provide up to 85.9% better throughput in a CPU-constrained environment than SwitchML. For distributed query processing with floating point data, FPISA enables up to 2.7× better throughput than Spark.
items.abstract_zh: 具有可编程数据平面的交换机的出现促进了新网络功能的快速开发，并提供了加速各种应用级功能的平台。然而，现有交换机硬件的设计并未考虑应用程序加速，因此需要传统网络协议中未使用的操作或数据类型的应用程序必须诉诸昂贵的解决方法。涉及浮点数据的应用程序，包括机器学习的分布式训练和分布式查询处理，都是关键的例子。在本文中，我们提出了 FPISA，这是一种浮点表示形式，旨在在可编程开关中高效工作。我们首先在 Intel Tofino 交换机上实施 FPISA，但发现它存在影响吞吐量和准确性的限制。然后，我们基于开源 Banzai 开关架构提出硬件更改以解决这些限制，并将它们综合在 15 nm 标准单元库中以证明其可行性。最后，我们使用 FPISA 来实现用于机器学习训练和查询处理的加速器，并使用仿真评估它们在实施我们的更改的交换机上的性能。我们发现，与 SwitchML 相比，FPISA 允许分布式训练使用的 CPU 核心数减少 25-75%，并在 CPU 受限的环境中提供高达 85.9% 的吞吐量。对于浮点数据的分布式查询处理，FPISA 的吞吐量比 Spark 高出 2.7 倍。

items.title: Tiara: A Scalable and Efficient Hardware Acceleration Architecture for Stateful Layer-4 Load Balancing.
items.abstract: Stateful layer-4 load balancers (LB) are deployed at datacenter boundaries to distribute Internet traffic to backend real servers. To steer terabits per second traffic, traditional software LBs scale out with many expensive servers. Recent switch-accelerated LBs scale up efficiently, but fail to offload a massive number of concurrent flows into limited on-chip SRAMs. This paper presents Tiara, a hardware architecture for stateful layer-4 LBs that aims to support a high traffic rate (> 1 Tbps), a large number of concurrent flows (> 10M), and many new connections per second (> 1M), without any assumption on traffic patterns. The three-tier architecture of Tiara makes the best use of heterogeneous hardware for stateful LBs, including a programmable switch and FPGAs for the fast path and x86 servers for the slow path. The core idea of Tiara is to divide the LB fast path into a memory-intensive task (real server selection) and a throughput-intensive task (packet encap/decap), and map them into the most suitable hardware, respectively (i.e., map real server selection into FPGA with large high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and packet encap/decap into a high-throughput programmable switch). We have implemented a fully functional Tiara prototype, and experiments show that Tiara can achieve extremely high performance (1.6 Tbps throughput, 80M concurrent flows, 1.8M new connections per second, and less than 4 us latency in the fast path) in a holistic server equipped with 8 FPGA cards, with high cost, energy, and space efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 有状态的第 4 层负载均衡器 (LB) 部署在数据中心边界，以将 Internet 流量分发到后端真实服务器。为了控制每秒太比特的流量，传统的软件负载均衡器通过许多昂贵的服务器进行扩展。最近的开关加速负载均衡器可以有效地扩展，但无法将大量并发流卸载到有限的片上 SRAM 中。本文介绍了 Tiara，一种用于有状态第 4 层 LB 的硬件架构，旨在支持高流量速率 (> 1 Tbps)、大量并发流量 (> 10M) 和每秒许多新连接 (> 1M)，而无需对流量模式进行任何假设。 Tiara 的三层架构充分利用了有状态 LB 的异构硬件，包括用于快速路径的可编程交换机和 FPGA，以及用于慢速路径的 x86 服务器。 Tiara的核心思想是将LB快速路径分为内存密集型任务（真实服务器选择）和吞吐量密集型任务（数据包封装/解封），并将它们分别映射到最合适的硬件（即，将真实服务器选择映射到具有大容量高带宽内存（HBM）的FPGA，将数据包封装/解封映射到高吞吐量可编程交换机）。我们已经实现了功能齐全的 Tiara 原型，实验表明 Tiara 在配备 8 个 FPGA 卡的整体服务器中可以实现极高的性能（1.6 Tbps 吞吐量、80M 并发流、每秒 1.8M 新连接、快速路径中低于 4 us 的延迟），具有很高的成本、能源和空间效率。

items.title: SwiSh: Distributed Shared State Abstractions for Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: We design and evaluate SwiSh , a distributed shared state management layer for data-plane P4 programs. SwiSh enables running scalable stateful distributed network functions on programmable switches entirely in the data-plane. We explore several schemes to build a shared variable abstraction, which differ in consistency, performance, and in-switch implementation complexity. We introduce the novel Strong Delayed-Writes (SDW) protocol which offers consistent snapshots of shared data-plane objects with semantics known as r -relaxed strong linearizability, enabling implementation of distributed concurrent sketches with precise error bounds. We implement strong, eventual, and SDW consistency protocols in Tofino switches, and compare their performance in microbenchmarks and three realistic network functions, NAT, DDoS detector, and rate limiter. Our results show that the distributed state management in the data plane is practical, and outperforms centralized solutions by up to four orders of magnitude in update throughput and replication latency.
items.abstract_zh: 我们设计并评估了 SwiSh，这是一个用于数据平面 P4 程序的分布式共享状态管理层。 SwiSh 允许完全在数据平面中的可编程交换机上运行可扩展的有状态分布式网络功能。我们探索了几种构建共享变量抽象的方案，这些方案在一致性、性能和交换机内实现复杂性方面有所不同。我们引入了新颖的强延迟写入 (SDW) 协议，该协议提供共享数据平面对象的一致快照，其语义称为 r 松弛强线性化，从而能够实现具有精确错误界限的分布式并发草图。我们在 Tofino 交换机中实现了强大的、最终的和 SDW 一致性协议，并在微基准测试和三种实际网络功能（NAT、DDoS 检测器和速率限制器）中比较了它们的性能。我们的结果表明，数据平面中的分布式状态管理是实用的，并且在更新吞吐量和复制延迟方面比集中式解决方案高出四个数量级。

items.title: PLatter: On the Feasibility of Building-scale Power Line Backscatter.
items.abstract: This paper explores the feasibility of reusing power lines in a large industrial space to enable long-range backscatter communication between a single reader and ultra-low-power backscatter sensors on the walls that are physically not connected to these power lines, but merely in their vicinity. Such a system could significantly improve the data rate and range of backscatter communication with only a single reader installed, by using pre-existing power lines as communication media. We present PLatter, a building-scale backscatter system that allows ultra-low-power backscatter sensors or tags attached to walls with power lines right behind them to communicate with a reader several hundred feet away. PLatter achieves this by inducing and modulating parasitic impedance on power lines with the tag toggling between two loads in specialized patterns. We present a detailed evaluation of both the strengths and weaknesses of PLatter on a large industrial testbed with power lines up to 300 feet long, demonstrating a maximum data rate of 4 Mbps.
items.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了在大型工业空间中重复使用电源线的可行性，以实现单个阅读器与墙壁上的超低功耗反向散射传感器之间的远程反向散射通信，这些传感器在物理上并未连接到这些电源线，而仅在其附近。通过使用预先存在的电力线作为通信介质，这样的系统只需安装一个读取器就可以显着提高数据速率和反向散射通信的范围。我们推出了 PLAtter，这是一种建筑规模的反向散射系统，允许将超低功耗反向散射传感器或标签附着在墙壁上，并通过其后面的电源线与数百英尺外的阅读器进行通信。 PLAtter 通过感应和调制电源线上的寄生阻抗来实现这一点，标签以专门的模式在两个负载之间切换。我们在电源线长达 300 英尺的大型工业测试台上对 PLAtter 的优点和缺点进行了详细评估，展示了 4 Mbps 的最大数据速率。

items.title: Justitia: Software Multi-Tenancy in Hardware Kernel-Bypass Networks.
items.abstract: Kernel-bypass networking (KBN) is becoming the new norm in modern datacenters. While hardware-based KBN offloads all dataplane tasks to specialized NICs to achieve better latency and CPU efficiency than software-based KBN, it also takes away the operator’s control over network sharing policies. Providing policy support in multi-tenant hardware KBN brings unique challenges – namely, preserving ultra-low latency and low CPU cost, finding a well-defined point of mediation, and rethinking traffic shapers. We present Justitia to address these challenges with three key design aspects: (i) Split Connection with message-level shaping, (ii) sender-based resource mediation together with receiver-side updates, and (iii) passive latency monitoring. Using a latency target as its knob, Justitia enables multi-tenancy policies such as predictable latencies and fair/weighted resource sharing. Our evaluation shows Justitia can effectively isolate latency-sensitive applications at the cost of slightly decreased utilization and ensure that throughput and bandwidth of the rest are not unfairly penalized.
items.abstract_zh: 内核旁路网络 (KBN) 正在成为现代数据中心的新规范。虽然基于硬件的 KBN 将所有数据平面任务卸载到专用 NIC，以实现比基于软件的 KBN 更好的延迟和 CPU 效率，但它也剥夺了运营商对网络共享策略的控制。在多租户硬件 KBN 中提供策略支持带来了独特的挑战，即保持超低延迟和低 CPU 成本、找到明确定义的中介点以及重新思考流量整形器。我们提出 Justitia 通过三个关键设计方面来应对这些挑战：(i) 具有消息级整形的拆分连接，(ii) 基于发送者的资源中介以及接收者端更新，以及 (iii) 被动延迟监控。 Justitia 使用延迟目标作为旋钮，支持多租户策略，例如可预测的延迟和公平/加权资源共享。我们的评估表明，Justitia 可以有效隔离对延迟敏感的应用程序，但代价是利用率略有下降，并确保其余应用程序的吞吐量和带宽不会受到不公平的惩罚。

items.title: YuZu: Neural-Enhanced Volumetric Video Streaming.
items.abstract: Differing from traditional 2D videos, volumetric videos provide true 3D immersive viewing experiences and allow viewers to exercise six degree-of-freedom (6DoF) motion. However, streaming high-quality volumetric videos over the Internet is extremely bandwidth-consuming. In this paper, we propose to leverage 3D super resolution (SR) to drastically increase the visual quality of volumetric video streaming. To accomplish this goal, we conduct deep intra- and inter-frame optimizations for off-the-shelf 3D SR models, and achieve up to 542× speedup on SR inference without accuracy degradation. We also derive a first Quality of Experience (QoE) model for SR-enhanced volumetric video streaming, and validate it through extensive user studies involving 1,446 subjects, achieving a median QoE estimation error of 12.49%. We then integrate the above components, together with important features such as QoE-driven network/compute resource adaptation, into a holistic system called YuZu that performs line-rate (at 30+ FPS) adaptive SR for volumetric video streaming. Our evaluations show that YuZu can boost the QoE of volumetric video streaming by 37% to 178% compared to no SR, and outperform existing viewport-adaptive solutions by 101% to 175% on QoE.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统 2D 视频不同，体积视频提供真正的 3D 沉浸式观看体验，并允许观看者进行六自由度 (6DoF) 运动。然而，通过互联网流式传输高质量立体视频非常消耗带宽。在本文中，我们建议利用 3D 超分辨率 (SR) 大幅提高体积视频流的视觉质量。为了实现这一目标，我们对现成的 3D SR 模型进行深度帧内和帧间优化，并在不降低精度的情况下实现 SR 推理高达 542 倍的加速。我们还推导出了第一个用于 SR 增强体积视频流的体验质量 (QoE) 模型，并通过涉及 1,446 名受试者的广泛用户研究对其进行了验证，实现了 12.49% 的中位 QoE 估计误差。然后，我们将上述组件以及 QoE 驱动的网络/计算资源自适应等重要功能集成到名为 YuZu 的整体系统中，该系统为体积视频流执行线速（30+ FPS）自适应 SR。我们的评估表明，与无 SR 相比，YuZu 可以将体积视频流的 QoE 提高 37% 至 178%，并且在 QoE 上比现有的视口自适应解决方案高出 101% 至 175%。

items.title: Zeta: A Scalable and Robust East-West Communication Framework in Large-Scale Clouds.
items.abstract: With the broad deployment of distributed applications on clouds, the dominant volume of traffic in cloud networks traverses in an east-west direction, flowing from server to server within a data center. Existing communication solutions are tightly coupled with either the control plane ( e.g. , preprogrammed model) or the location of compute nodes ( e.g. , conventional gateway model). The tight coupling makes it challenging to adapt to rapid network expansion, respond to network anomalies ( e.g. , burst traffic and device failures), and maintain low latency for east-west traffic. To address this issue, we design Zeta, a scalable and robust east-west communication framework with gateway clusters in large-scale clouds. Zeta abstracts the traffic forwarding capability as a Gateway Cluster Layer, decoupled from the logic of control plane and the location of compute nodes. Specifically, Zeta adopts gateway clusters to support large-scale networks and cope with burst traffic. Moreover, a transparent Multi IPs Migration is proposed to quickly recover the system/devices from unpredictable failures. We implement Zeta based on eXpress Data Path (XDP) and evaluate its scalability and robustness through comprehensive experiments with up to 100k container instances. Our evaluation shows that Zeta reduces the 99% RTT by 5.1 × in burst video traffic, and speeds up the gateway recovery by 10.8 × compared with the state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 随着分布式应用在云上的广泛部署，云网络中的主要流量是东西向的，在数据​​中心内的服务器之间流动。现有的通信解决方案与控制平面（例如，预编程模型）或计算节点的位置（例如，传统网关模型）紧密耦合。这种紧密的耦合使得适应网络的快速扩展、响应网络异常（例如突发流量和设备故障）以及保持东西向流量的低延迟变得具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了 Zeta，一个可扩展且强大的东西向通信框架，在大规模云中具有网关集群。 Zeta将流量转发能力抽象为网关集群层，与控制平面逻辑和计算节点位置解耦。具体来说，Zeta采用网关集群来支持大规模网络并应对突发流量。此外，还提出了透明的多 IP 迁移，以便从不可预测的故障中快速恢复系统/设备。我们基于 eXpress 数据路径 (XDP) 实现 Zeta，并通过多达 10 万个容器实例的综合实验来评估其可扩展性和鲁棒性。我们的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，Zeta 将突发视频流量的 99% RTT 降低了 5.1 倍，并将网关恢复速度提高了 10.8 倍。

items.title: NetVRM: Virtual Register Memory for Programmable Networks.
items.abstract: Programmable networks are enabling a new class of applications that leverage the line-rate processing capability and on-chip register memory of the switch data plane. Yet the status quo is focused on developing approaches that share the register memory statically. We present NetVRM, a network management system that supports dynamic register memory sharing between multiple concurrent applications on a programmable network and is readily deployable on commodity programmable switches. NetVRM provides a virtual register memory abstraction that enables applications to share the register memory in the data plane, and abstracts away the underlying details. In principle, NetVRM supports any memory allocation algorithm given the virtual register memory abstraction . It also provides a default memory allocation algorithm that exploits the observation that applications have diminishing returns on additional memory. NetVRM provides an extension of P4, P4VRM, for developing applications with virtual register memory, and a compiler to generate data plane programs and control plane APIs. Testbed experiments show that NetVRM generalizes to a diverse variety of applications, and that its utility-based dynamic allocation policy outperforms static resource allocation. Specifically, it improves the mean satisfaction ratio (i.e., the fraction of a network application’s lifetime that it meets its utility target) by 1.6–2.2× under a range of workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 可编程网络正在支持利用线速处理能力和交换机数据平面的片上寄存器存储器的新型应用。然而现状的重点是开发静态共享寄存器内存的方法。我们推出的 NetVRM 是一种网络管理系统，支持可编程网络上多个并发应用程序之间的动态寄存器内存共享，并且可以轻松部署在商用可编程交换机上。 NetVRM 提供虚拟寄存器内存抽象，使应用程序能够共享数据平面中的寄存器内存，并抽象出底层细节。原则上，NetVRM 支持任何给定虚拟寄存器内存抽象的内存分配算法。它还提供了默认的内存分配算法，该算法利用了应用程序在额外内存上收益递减的观察结果。 NetVRM 提供了 P4 的扩展 P4VRM，用于开发具有虚拟寄存器内存的应用程序，以及用于生成数据平面程序和控制平面 API 的编译器。测试台实验表明，NetVRM 可以推广到多种应用，并且其基于效用的动态分配策略优于静态资源分配。具体来说，它在一系列工作负载下将平均满意度（即网络应用程序生命周期中满足其效用目标的比例）提高了 1.6-2.2 倍。
